<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">style</span> <span class="hljs-attr">type</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"text/css"</span>&gt;</span><span class="css">
<span class="hljs-comment">/*-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
| Copyright (c) Jupyter Development Team.
| Distributed under the terms of the Modified BSD License.
|----------------------------------------------------------------------------*/</span>

<span class="hljs-comment">/*
 * Mozilla scrollbar styling
 */</span>

<span class="hljs-comment">/* use standard opaque scrollbars for most nodes */</span>
<span class="hljs-selector-attr">[data-jp-theme-scrollbars=<span class="hljs-string">'true'</span>]</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">scrollbar-color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">rgb</span>(var(--jp-scrollbar-thumb-color))
    <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-scrollbar-background-color);
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/* for code nodes, use a transparent style of scrollbar. These selectors
 * will match lower in the tree, and so will override the above */</span>
<span class="hljs-selector-attr">[data-jp-theme-scrollbars=<span class="hljs-string">'true'</span>]</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.CodeMirror-hscrollbar</span>,
<span class="hljs-selector-attr">[data-jp-theme-scrollbars=<span class="hljs-string">'true'</span>]</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.CodeMirror-vscrollbar</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">scrollbar-color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">rgba</span>(var(--jp-scrollbar-thumb-color), <span class="hljs-number">0.5</span>) transparent;
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/* tiny scrollbar */</span>

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-scrollbar-tiny</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">scrollbar-color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">rgba</span>(var(--jp-scrollbar-thumb-color), <span class="hljs-number">0.5</span>) transparent;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">scrollbar-width</span>: thin;
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/* tiny scrollbar */</span>

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-scrollbar-tiny</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">::-webkit-scrollbar</span>,
<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-scrollbar-tiny</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">::-webkit-scrollbar-corner</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-color</span>: transparent;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">height</span>: <span class="hljs-number">4px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">width</span>: <span class="hljs-number">4px</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-scrollbar-tiny</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">rgba</span>(var(--jp-scrollbar-thumb-color), <span class="hljs-number">0.5</span>);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-scrollbar-tiny</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">::-webkit-scrollbar-track</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:horizontal</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border-left</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span> solid transparent;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border-right</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span> solid transparent;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-scrollbar-tiny</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">::-webkit-scrollbar-track</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:vertical</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border-top</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span> solid transparent;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border-bottom</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span> solid transparent;
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/*
 * Lumino
 */</span>

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-ScrollBar</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[data-orientation=<span class="hljs-string">'horizontal'</span>]</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">min-height</span>: <span class="hljs-number">16px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">max-height</span>: <span class="hljs-number">16px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">min-width</span>: <span class="hljs-number">45px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border-top</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1px</span> solid <span class="hljs-number">#a0a0a0</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-ScrollBar</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[data-orientation=<span class="hljs-string">'vertical'</span>]</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">min-width</span>: <span class="hljs-number">16px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">max-width</span>: <span class="hljs-number">16px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">min-height</span>: <span class="hljs-number">45px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border-left</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1px</span> solid <span class="hljs-number">#a0a0a0</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-ScrollBar-button</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-color</span>: <span class="hljs-number">#f0f0f0</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-position</span>: center center;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">min-height</span>: <span class="hljs-number">15px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">max-height</span>: <span class="hljs-number">15px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">min-width</span>: <span class="hljs-number">15px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">max-width</span>: <span class="hljs-number">15px</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-ScrollBar-button</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:hover</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-color</span>: <span class="hljs-number">#dadada</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-ScrollBar-button</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-mod-active</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-color</span>: <span class="hljs-number">#cdcdcd</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-ScrollBar-track</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background</span>: <span class="hljs-number">#f0f0f0</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-ScrollBar-thumb</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background</span>: <span class="hljs-number">#cdcdcd</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-ScrollBar-thumb</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:hover</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background</span>: <span class="hljs-number">#bababa</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-ScrollBar-thumb</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-mod-active</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background</span>: <span class="hljs-number">#a0a0a0</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-ScrollBar</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[data-orientation=<span class="hljs-string">'horizontal'</span>]</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-ScrollBar-thumb</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">height</span>: <span class="hljs-number">100%</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">min-width</span>: <span class="hljs-number">15px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border-left</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1px</span> solid <span class="hljs-number">#a0a0a0</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border-right</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1px</span> solid <span class="hljs-number">#a0a0a0</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-ScrollBar</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[data-orientation=<span class="hljs-string">'vertical'</span>]</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-ScrollBar-thumb</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">width</span>: <span class="hljs-number">100%</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">min-height</span>: <span class="hljs-number">15px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border-top</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1px</span> solid <span class="hljs-number">#a0a0a0</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border-bottom</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1px</span> solid <span class="hljs-number">#a0a0a0</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-ScrollBar</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[data-orientation=<span class="hljs-string">'horizontal'</span>]</span>
  <span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-ScrollBar-button</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[data-action=<span class="hljs-string">'decrement'</span>]</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-image</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-icon-caret-left);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-size</span>: <span class="hljs-number">17px</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-ScrollBar</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[data-orientation=<span class="hljs-string">'horizontal'</span>]</span>
  <span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-ScrollBar-button</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[data-action=<span class="hljs-string">'increment'</span>]</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-image</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-icon-caret-right);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-size</span>: <span class="hljs-number">17px</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-ScrollBar</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[data-orientation=<span class="hljs-string">'vertical'</span>]</span>
  <span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-ScrollBar-button</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[data-action=<span class="hljs-string">'decrement'</span>]</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-image</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-icon-caret-up);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-size</span>: <span class="hljs-number">17px</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-ScrollBar</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[data-orientation=<span class="hljs-string">'vertical'</span>]</span>
  <span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-ScrollBar-button</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[data-action=<span class="hljs-string">'increment'</span>]</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-image</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-icon-caret-down);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-size</span>: <span class="hljs-number">17px</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-Widget</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">box-sizing</span>: border-box;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">position</span>: relative;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">overflow</span>: hidden;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-Widget</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-mod-hidden</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: none <span class="hljs-meta">!important</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/*

 * Distributed under the terms of the Modified BSD License.
 */</span>

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-AccordionPanel</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[data-orientation=<span class="hljs-string">'horizontal'</span>]</span> &gt; <span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-AccordionPanel-title</span> {
  <span class="hljs-comment">/* Title is rotated for horizontal accordion panel using CSS */</span>
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: block;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">transform-origin</span>: top left;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">transform</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">rotate</span>(-<span class="hljs-number">90deg</span>) <span class="hljs-built_in">translate</span>(-<span class="hljs-number">100%</span>);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-CommandPalette</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: flex;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">flex-direction</span>: column;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">-webkit-user-select</span>: none;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">-moz-user-select</span>: none;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">-ms-user-select</span>: none;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">user-select</span>: none;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-CommandPalette-search</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">flex</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">0</span> auto;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-CommandPalette-content</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">flex</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1</span> <span class="hljs-number">1</span> auto;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">min-height</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">overflow</span>: auto;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">list-style-type</span>: none;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-CommandPalette-header</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">overflow</span>: hidden;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">white-space</span>: nowrap;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">text-overflow</span>: ellipsis;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-CommandPalette-item</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: flex;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">flex-direction</span>: row;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-CommandPalette-itemIcon</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">flex</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">0</span> auto;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-CommandPalette-itemContent</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">flex</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1</span> <span class="hljs-number">1</span> auto;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">overflow</span>: hidden;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-CommandPalette-itemShortcut</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">flex</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">0</span> auto;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-CommandPalette-itemLabel</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">overflow</span>: hidden;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">white-space</span>: nowrap;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">text-overflow</span>: ellipsis;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-close-icon</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1px</span> solid transparent;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-color</span>: transparent;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">position</span>: absolute;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">z-index</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">right</span>: <span class="hljs-number">3%</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">top</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">bottom</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin</span>: auto;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding</span>: <span class="hljs-number">7px</span> <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: none;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">vertical-align</span>: middle;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">outline</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">cursor</span>: pointer;
}
<span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-close-icon</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:after</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">content</span>: <span class="hljs-string">'X'</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: block;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">width</span>: <span class="hljs-number">15px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">height</span>: <span class="hljs-number">15px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">text-align</span>: center;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">color</span>: <span class="hljs-number">#000</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">font-weight</span>: normal;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">font-size</span>: <span class="hljs-number">12px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">cursor</span>: pointer;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-DockPanel</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">z-index</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-DockPanel-widget</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">z-index</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-DockPanel-tabBar</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">z-index</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-DockPanel-handle</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">z-index</span>: <span class="hljs-number">2</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-DockPanel-handle</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-mod-hidden</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: none <span class="hljs-meta">!important</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-DockPanel-handle</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:after</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">position</span>: absolute;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">top</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">left</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">width</span>: <span class="hljs-number">100%</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">height</span>: <span class="hljs-number">100%</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">content</span>: <span class="hljs-string">''</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-DockPanel-handle</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[data-orientation=<span class="hljs-string">'horizontal'</span>]</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">cursor</span>: ew-resize;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-DockPanel-handle</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[data-orientation=<span class="hljs-string">'vertical'</span>]</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">cursor</span>: ns-resize;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-DockPanel-handle</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[data-orientation=<span class="hljs-string">'horizontal'</span>]</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:after</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">left</span>: <span class="hljs-number">50%</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">min-width</span>: <span class="hljs-number">8px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">transform</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">translateX</span>(-<span class="hljs-number">50%</span>);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-DockPanel-handle</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[data-orientation=<span class="hljs-string">'vertical'</span>]</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:after</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">top</span>: <span class="hljs-number">50%</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">min-height</span>: <span class="hljs-number">8px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">transform</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">translateY</span>(-<span class="hljs-number">50%</span>);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-DockPanel-overlay</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">z-index</span>: <span class="hljs-number">3</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">box-sizing</span>: border-box;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">pointer-events</span>: none;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-DockPanel-overlay</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-mod-hidden</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: none <span class="hljs-meta">!important</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-Menu</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">z-index</span>: <span class="hljs-number">10000</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">position</span>: absolute;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">white-space</span>: nowrap;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">overflow-x</span>: hidden;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">overflow-y</span>: auto;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">outline</span>: none;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">-webkit-user-select</span>: none;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">-moz-user-select</span>: none;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">-ms-user-select</span>: none;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">user-select</span>: none;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-Menu-content</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: table;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">list-style-type</span>: none;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-Menu-item</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: table-row;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-Menu-item</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-mod-hidden</span>,
<span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-Menu-item</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-mod-collapsed</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: none <span class="hljs-meta">!important</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-Menu-itemIcon</span>,
<span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-Menu-itemSubmenuIcon</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: table-cell;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">text-align</span>: center;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-Menu-itemLabel</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: table-cell;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">text-align</span>: left;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-Menu-itemShortcut</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: table-cell;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">text-align</span>: right;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-MenuBar</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">outline</span>: none;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">-webkit-user-select</span>: none;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">-moz-user-select</span>: none;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">-ms-user-select</span>: none;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">user-select</span>: none;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-MenuBar-content</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: flex;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">flex-direction</span>: row;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">list-style-type</span>: none;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-MenuBar-item</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">box-sizing</span>: border-box;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-MenuBar-itemIcon</span>,
<span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-MenuBar-itemLabel</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: inline-block;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-ScrollBar</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: flex;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">-webkit-user-select</span>: none;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">-moz-user-select</span>: none;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">-ms-user-select</span>: none;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">user-select</span>: none;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-ScrollBar</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[data-orientation=<span class="hljs-string">'horizontal'</span>]</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">flex-direction</span>: row;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-ScrollBar</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[data-orientation=<span class="hljs-string">'vertical'</span>]</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">flex-direction</span>: column;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-ScrollBar-button</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">box-sizing</span>: border-box;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">flex</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">0</span> auto;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-ScrollBar-track</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">box-sizing</span>: border-box;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">position</span>: relative;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">overflow</span>: hidden;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">flex</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1</span> <span class="hljs-number">1</span> auto;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-ScrollBar-thumb</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">box-sizing</span>: border-box;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">position</span>: absolute;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-SplitPanel-child</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">z-index</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-SplitPanel-handle</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">z-index</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-SplitPanel-handle</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-mod-hidden</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: none <span class="hljs-meta">!important</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-SplitPanel-handle</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:after</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">position</span>: absolute;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">top</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">left</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">width</span>: <span class="hljs-number">100%</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">height</span>: <span class="hljs-number">100%</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">content</span>: <span class="hljs-string">''</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-SplitPanel</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[data-orientation=<span class="hljs-string">'horizontal'</span>]</span> &gt; <span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-SplitPanel-handle</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">cursor</span>: ew-resize;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-SplitPanel</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[data-orientation=<span class="hljs-string">'vertical'</span>]</span> &gt; <span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-SplitPanel-handle</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">cursor</span>: ns-resize;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-SplitPanel</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[data-orientation=<span class="hljs-string">'horizontal'</span>]</span> &gt; <span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-SplitPanel-handle</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:after</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">left</span>: <span class="hljs-number">50%</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">min-width</span>: <span class="hljs-number">8px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">transform</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">translateX</span>(-<span class="hljs-number">50%</span>);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-SplitPanel</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[data-orientation=<span class="hljs-string">'vertical'</span>]</span> &gt; <span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-SplitPanel-handle</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:after</span> {

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-TabBar</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: flex;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">-webkit-user-select</span>: none;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">-moz-user-select</span>: none;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">-ms-user-select</span>: none;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">user-select</span>: none;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-TabBar</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[data-orientation=<span class="hljs-string">'horizontal'</span>]</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">flex-direction</span>: row;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">align-items</span>: flex-end;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-TabBar</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[data-orientation=<span class="hljs-string">'vertical'</span>]</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">flex-direction</span>: column;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">align-items</span>: flex-end;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-TabBar-content</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: flex;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">flex</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1</span> <span class="hljs-number">1</span> auto;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">list-style-type</span>: none;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-TabBar</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[data-orientation=<span class="hljs-string">'horizontal'</span>]</span> &gt; <span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-TabBar-content</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">flex-direction</span>: row;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-TabBar</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[data-orientation=<span class="hljs-string">'vertical'</span>]</span> &gt; <span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-TabBar-content</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">flex-direction</span>: column;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-TabBar-tab</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: flex;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">flex-direction</span>: row;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">box-sizing</span>: border-box;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">overflow</span>: hidden;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">touch-action</span>: none; <span class="hljs-comment">/* Disable native Drag/Drop */</span>
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-TabBar-tabIcon</span>,
<span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-TabBar-tabCloseIcon</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">flex</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">0</span> auto;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-TabBar-tabLabel</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">flex</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1</span> <span class="hljs-number">1</span> auto;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">overflow</span>: hidden;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">white-space</span>: nowrap;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-TabBar-tabInput</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">user-select</span>: all;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">width</span>: <span class="hljs-number">100%</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">box-sizing</span>: border-box;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-TabBar-tab</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-mod-hidden</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: none <span class="hljs-meta">!important</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-TabBar-addButton</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-mod-hidden</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: none <span class="hljs-meta">!important</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-TabBar</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-mod-dragging</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-TabBar-tab</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">position</span>: relative;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-TabBar</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-mod-dragging</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[data-orientation=<span class="hljs-string">'horizontal'</span>]</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-TabBar-tab</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">left</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">transition</span>: left <span class="hljs-number">150ms</span> ease;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-TabBar</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-mod-dragging</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[data-orientation=<span class="hljs-string">'vertical'</span>]</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-TabBar-tab</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">top</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">transition</span>: top <span class="hljs-number">150ms</span> ease;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-TabBar</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-mod-dragging</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-TabBar-tab</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-mod-dragging</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">transition</span>: none;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-TabBar-tabLabel</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-TabBar-tabInput</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">user-select</span>: all;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">width</span>: <span class="hljs-number">100%</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">box-sizing</span>: border-box;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background</span>: inherit;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-TabPanel-tabBar</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">z-index</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-TabPanel-stackedPanel</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">z-index</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Collapse</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: flex;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">flex-direction</span>: column;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">align-items</span>: stretch;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Collapse-header</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1px</span> <span class="hljs-number">12px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-layout-color1);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border-bottom</span>: solid <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-border-width) <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-border-color2);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-ui-font-color1);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">cursor</span>: pointer;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: flex;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">align-items</span>: center;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">font-size</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-ui-font-size0);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">font-weight</span>: <span class="hljs-number">600</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">text-transform</span>: uppercase;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">user-select</span>: none;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Collapser-icon</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">height</span>: <span class="hljs-number">16px</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Collapse-header-collapsed</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Collapser-icon</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">transform</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">rotate</span>(-<span class="hljs-number">90deg</span>);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin</span>: auto <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Collapser-title</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">line-height</span>: <span class="hljs-number">25px</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Collapse-contents</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">12px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-layout-color1);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-ui-font-color1);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">overflow</span>: auto;
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/* Icon CSS class declarations */</span>

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-AddAboveIcon</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-image</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-icon-add-above);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-AddBelowIcon</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-image</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-icon-add-below);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-AddIcon</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-image</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-icon-add);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-BellIcon</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-image</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-icon-bell);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-BugDotIcon</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-image</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-icon-bug-dot);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-BugIcon</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-image</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-icon-bug);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-BuildIcon</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-image</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-icon-build);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-PdfIcon</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-image</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-icon-pdf);
}

  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-image</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-icon-python);

  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-image</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-icon-r-kernel);

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-ReactIcon</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-image</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-icon-react);

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-RedoIcon</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-image</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-icon-redo);

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-RefreshIcon</span> {

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-RegexIcon</span> {

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-RunningIcon</span> {

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-SaveIcon</span> {

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-SearchIcon</span> {

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-StopIcon</span> {

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-TagIcon</span> {

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-TerminalIcon</span> {

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-TextEditorIcon</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-image</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-icon-text-editor);

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-TocIcon</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-image</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-icon-toc);

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-TreeViewIcon</span> {

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-TrustedIcon</span> {

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-UndoIcon</span> {

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-VegaIcon</span> {

<span class="hljs-comment">/*-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
| Copyright (c) Jupyter Development Team.
| Distributed under the terms of the Modified BSD License.
|----------------------------------------------------------------------------*/</span>

<span class="hljs-comment">/**
 * (DEPRECATED) Support for consuming icons as CSS background images
 */</span>

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Icon</span>,
<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-MaterialIcon</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-position</span>: center;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-repeat</span>: no-repeat;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-size</span>: <span class="hljs-number">16px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">min-width</span>: <span class="hljs-number">16px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">min-height</span>: <span class="hljs-number">16px</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Icon-cover</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-position</span>: center;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-repeat</span>: no-repeat;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-size</span>: cover;
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/**
 * (DEPRECATED) Support for specific CSS icon sizes
 */</span>

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Icon-16</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-size</span>: <span class="hljs-number">16px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">min-width</span>: <span class="hljs-number">16px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">min-height</span>: <span class="hljs-number">16px</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Icon-18</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-size</span>: <span class="hljs-number">18px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">min-width</span>: <span class="hljs-number">18px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">min-height</span>: <span class="hljs-number">18px</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Icon-20</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-size</span>: <span class="hljs-number">20px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">min-width</span>: <span class="hljs-number">20px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">min-height</span>: <span class="hljs-number">20px</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/*-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
| Copyright (c) Jupyter Development Team.
| Distributed under the terms of the Modified BSD License.
|----------------------------------------------------------------------------*/</span>

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-TabBar</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-TabBar-addButton</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">align-items</span>: center;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: flex;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding</span>: <span class="hljs-number">4px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding-bottom</span>: <span class="hljs-number">5px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin-right</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-layout-color2);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-TabBar</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-TabBar-addButton</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:hover</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-layout-color1);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-DockPanel-tabBar</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-TabBar-tab</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">width</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-private-horizontal-tab-width);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-DockPanel-tabBar</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-TabBar-content</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">flex</span>: unset;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-DockPanel-tabBar</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[data-orientation=<span class="hljs-string">'horizontal'</span>]</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">flex</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1</span> <span class="hljs-number">1</span> auto;
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/*-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
| Copyright (c) Jupyter Development Team.
| Distributed under the terms of the Modified BSD License.
|----------------------------------------------------------------------------*/</span>

<span class="hljs-comment">/**
 * Support for icons as inline SVG HTMLElements
 */</span>

<span class="hljs-comment">/* recolor the primary elements of an icon */</span>
<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-icon0</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[fill]</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">fill</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-inverse-layout-color0);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-icon1</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[fill]</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">fill</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-inverse-layout-color1);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-icon2</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[fill]</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">fill</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-inverse-layout-color2);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-icon3</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[fill]</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">fill</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-inverse-layout-color3);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-icon4</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[fill]</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">fill</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-inverse-layout-color4);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-icon0</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[stroke]</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">stroke</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-inverse-layout-color0);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-icon1</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[stroke]</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">stroke</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-inverse-layout-color1);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-icon2</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[stroke]</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">stroke</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-inverse-layout-color2);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-icon3</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[stroke]</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">stroke</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-inverse-layout-color3);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-icon4</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[stroke]</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">stroke</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-inverse-layout-color4);
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/* recolor the accent elements of an icon */</span>
<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-icon-accent0</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[fill]</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">fill</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-layout-color0);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-icon-accent1</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[fill]</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">fill</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-layout-color1);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-icon-accent2</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[fill]</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">fill</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-layout-color2);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-icon-accent3</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[fill]</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">fill</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-layout-color3);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-icon-accent4</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[fill]</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">fill</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-layout-color4);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-icon-accent0</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[stroke]</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">stroke</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-layout-color0);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-icon-accent1</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[stroke]</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">stroke</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-layout-color1);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-icon-accent2</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[stroke]</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">stroke</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-layout-color2);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-icon-accent3</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[stroke]</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">stroke</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-layout-color3);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-icon-accent4</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[stroke]</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">stroke</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-layout-color4);
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/* set the color of an icon to transparent */</span>
<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-icon-none</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[fill]</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">fill</span>: none;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-icon-none</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[stroke]</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">stroke</span>: none;
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/* brand icon colors. Same for light and dark */</span>
<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-icon-brand0</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[fill]</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">fill</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-brand-color0);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-icon-brand1</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[fill]</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">fill</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-brand-color1);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-icon-brand2</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[fill]</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">fill</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-brand-color2);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-icon-brand3</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[fill]</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">fill</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-brand-color3);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-icon-brand4</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[fill]</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">fill</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-brand-color4);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-icon-brand0</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[stroke]</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">stroke</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-brand-color0);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-icon-brand1</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[stroke]</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">stroke</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-brand-color1);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-icon-brand2</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[stroke]</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">stroke</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-brand-color2);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-icon-brand3</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[stroke]</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">stroke</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-brand-color3);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-icon-brand4</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[stroke]</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">stroke</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-brand-color4);
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/* warn icon colors. Same for light and dark */</span>
<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-icon-warn0</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[fill]</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">fill</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-warn-color0);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-icon-warn1</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[fill]</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">fill</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-warn-color1);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-icon-warn2</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[fill]</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">fill</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-warn-color2);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-icon-warn3</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[fill]</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">fill</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-warn-color3);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-icon-warn0</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[stroke]</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">stroke</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-warn-color0);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-icon-warn1</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[stroke]</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">stroke</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-warn-color1);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-icon-warn2</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[stroke]</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">stroke</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-warn-color2);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-icon-warn3</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[stroke]</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">stroke</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-warn-color3);
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/* icon colors that contrast well with each other and most backgrounds */</span>
<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-icon-contrast0</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[fill]</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">fill</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-icon-contrast-color0);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-icon-contrast1</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[fill]</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">fill</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-icon-contrast-color1);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-icon-contrast2</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[fill]</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">fill</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-icon-contrast-color2);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-icon-contrast3</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[fill]</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">fill</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-icon-contrast-color3);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-icon-contrast0</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[stroke]</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">stroke</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-icon-contrast-color0);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-icon-contrast1</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[stroke]</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">stroke</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-icon-contrast-color1);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-icon-contrast2</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[stroke]</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">stroke</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-icon-contrast-color2);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-icon-contrast3</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[stroke]</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">stroke</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-icon-contrast-color3);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-icon-dot</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[fill]</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">fill</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-warn-color0);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-jupyter-icon-color</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[fill]</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">fill</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-jupyter-icon-color, var(--jp-warn-color0));
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-notebook-icon-color</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[fill]</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">fill</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-notebook-icon-color, var(--jp-warn-color0));
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-json-icon-color</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[fill]</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">fill</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-json-icon-color, var(--jp-warn-color1));
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-console-icon-color</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[fill]</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">fill</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-console-icon-color, white);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-console-icon-background-color</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[fill]</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">fill</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-console-icon-background-color, var(--jp-brand-color1));
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-terminal-icon-color</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[fill]</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">fill</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-terminal-icon-color, var(--jp-layout-color2));
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-terminal-icon-background-color</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[fill]</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">fill</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(
    --jp-terminal-icon-background-color,
    var(--jp-inverse-layout-color2)
  );
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-text-editor-icon-color</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[fill]</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">fill</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-text-editor-icon-color, var(--jp-inverse-layout-color3));
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-inspector-icon-color</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[fill]</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">fill</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-inspector-icon-color, var(--jp-inverse-layout-color3));
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/* CSS for icons in selected filebrowser listing items */</span>
<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-DirListing-item</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-mod-selected</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-icon-selectable</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[fill]</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">fill</span>: <span class="hljs-number">#fff</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-DirListing-item</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-mod-selected</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-icon-selectable-inverse</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[fill]</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">fill</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-brand-color1);
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/* stylelint-disable selector-max-class, selector-max-compound-selectors */</span>

<span class="hljs-comment">/**
* <span class="hljs-doctag">TODO:</span> come up with non css-hack solution for showing the busy icon on top
*  of the close icon
* CSS for complex behavior of close icon of tabs in the main area tabbar
*/</span>
<span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-DockPanel-tabBar</span>
  <span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-TabBar-tab</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-mod-closable</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-mod-dirty</span>
  &gt; <span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-TabBar-tabCloseIcon</span>
  &gt; <span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:not(</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:hover)</span>
  &gt; <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-icon3</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[fill]</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">fill</span>: none;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-DockPanel-tabBar</span>
  <span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-TabBar-tab</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-mod-closable</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-mod-dirty</span>
  &gt; <span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-TabBar-tabCloseIcon</span>
  &gt; <span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:not(</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:hover)</span>
  &gt; <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-icon-busy</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[fill]</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">fill</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-inverse-layout-color3);
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/* stylelint-enable selector-max-class, selector-max-compound-selectors */</span>

<span class="hljs-comment">/* CSS for icons in status bar */</span>
<span class="hljs-selector-id">#jp-main-statusbar</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-mod-selected</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-icon-selectable</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[fill]</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">fill</span>: <span class="hljs-number">#fff</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-id">#jp-main-statusbar</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-mod-selected</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-icon-selectable-inverse</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[fill]</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">fill</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-brand-color1);
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/* special handling for splash icon CSS. While the theme CSS reloads during
   splash, the splash icon can loose theming. To prevent that, we set a
   default for its color variable */</span>
<span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:root</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-warn-color0</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--md-orange-<span class="hljs-number">700</span>);
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/* not sure what to do with this one, used in filebrowser listing */</span>
<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-DragIcon</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin-right</span>: <span class="hljs-number">4px</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/*-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
| Copyright (c) Jupyter Development Team.
| Distributed under the terms of the Modified BSD License.
|----------------------------------------------------------------------------*/</span>

<span class="hljs-comment">/**
 * Support for alt colors for icons as inline SVG HTMLElements
 */</span>

<span class="hljs-comment">/* alt recolor the primary elements of an icon */</span>
<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-icon-alt</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-icon0</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[fill]</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">fill</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-layout-color0);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-icon-alt</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-icon1</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[fill]</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">fill</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-layout-color1);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-icon-alt</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-icon2</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[fill]</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">fill</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-layout-color2);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-icon-alt</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-icon4</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[fill]</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">fill</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-layout-color4);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-icon-alt</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-icon0</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[stroke]</span> {

}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-icon-alt</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-icon1</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[stroke]</span> {

  <span class="hljs-attribute">stroke</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-layout-color4);

<span class="hljs-comment">/* alt recolor the accent elements of an icon */</span>
<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-icon-alt</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-icon-accent0</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[fill]</span> {

  <span class="hljs-attribute">fill</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-inverse-layout-color4);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-icon-hover</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-icon-alt</span> <span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:hover</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-icon-accent0-hover</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[stroke]</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">stroke</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-inverse-layout-color0);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-icon-hover</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-icon-alt</span> <span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:hover</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-icon-accent1-hover</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[stroke]</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">stroke</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-inverse-layout-color1);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-icon-hover</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-icon-alt</span> <span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:hover</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-icon-accent2-hover</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[stroke]</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">stroke</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-inverse-layout-color2);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-icon-hover</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-icon-alt</span> <span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:hover</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-icon-accent3-hover</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[stroke]</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">stroke</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-inverse-layout-color3);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-icon-hover</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-icon-alt</span> <span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:hover</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-icon-accent4-hover</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[stroke]</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">stroke</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-inverse-layout-color4);
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/*-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
| Copyright (c) Jupyter Development Team.
| Distributed under the terms of the Modified BSD License.
|----------------------------------------------------------------------------*/</span>

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-IFrame</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">width</span>: <span class="hljs-number">100%</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">height</span>: <span class="hljs-number">100%</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-IFrame</span> &gt; <span class="hljs-selector-tag">iframe</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border</span>: none;
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/*
When drag events occur, `lm-mod-override-cursor` is added to the body.
Because iframes steal all cursor events, the following two rules are necessary
to suppress pointer events while resize drags are occurring. There may be a
better solution to this problem.
*/</span>
<span class="hljs-selector-tag">body</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-mod-override-cursor</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-IFrame</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">position</span>: relative;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-tag">body</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-mod-override-cursor</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-IFrame</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">::before</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">content</span>: <span class="hljs-string">''</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">position</span>: absolute;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">top</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">left</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">right</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">bottom</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background</span>: transparent;
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/*-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
| Copyright (c) 2014-2016, Jupyter Development Team.
|
| Distributed under the terms of the Modified BSD License.
|----------------------------------------------------------------------------*/</span>

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-HoverBox</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">position</span>: fixed;
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/*-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
| Copyright (c) Jupyter Development Team.
| Distributed under the terms of the Modified BSD License.
|----------------------------------------------------------------------------*/</span>

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-FormGroup-content</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">fieldset</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border</span>: none;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">min-width</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">width</span>: <span class="hljs-number">100%</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/* stylelint-disable selector-max-type */</span>

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-FormGroup-content</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">fieldset</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-inputFieldWrapper</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">input</span>,
<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-FormGroup-content</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">fieldset</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-inputFieldWrapper</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">select</span>,
<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-FormGroup-content</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">fieldset</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-inputFieldWrapper</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">textarea</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">font-size</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-content-font-size2);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border-color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-input-border-color);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border-style</span>: solid;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border-radius</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-border-radius);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border-width</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding</span>: <span class="hljs-number">6px</span> <span class="hljs-number">8px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background</span>: none;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-ui-font-color0);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">height</span>: inherit;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-FormGroup-content</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">fieldset</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">input</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[type=<span class="hljs-string">'checkbox'</span>]</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">position</span>: relative;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">top</span>: <span class="hljs-number">2px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin-left</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-FormGroup-content</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">button</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-mod-styled</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">cursor</span>: pointer;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-FormGroup-content</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.checkbox</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">label</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">cursor</span>: pointer;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">font-size</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-content-font-size1);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-FormGroup-content</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-root</span> &gt; <span class="hljs-selector-tag">fieldset</span> &gt; <span class="hljs-selector-tag">legend</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: none;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-FormGroup-content</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-root</span> &gt; <span class="hljs-selector-tag">fieldset</span> &gt; <span class="hljs-selector-tag">p</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: none;
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/** copy of `input.jp-mod-styled:focus` style */</span>
<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-FormGroup-content</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">fieldset</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">input</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:focus</span>,
<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-FormGroup-content</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">fieldset</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">select</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:focus</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">-moz-outline-radius</span>: unset;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">outline</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-border-width) solid <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--md-blue-<span class="hljs-number">500</span>);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">outline-offset</span>: -<span class="hljs-number">1px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">box-shadow</span>: inset <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">4px</span> <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--md-blue-<span class="hljs-number">300</span>);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-FormGroup-content</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">fieldset</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">input</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:hover</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:not(</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:focus)</span>,
<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-FormGroup-content</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">fieldset</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">select</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:hover</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:not(</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:focus)</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-border-color2);
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/* stylelint-enable selector-max-type */</span>

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-FormGroup-content</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.checkbox</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.field-description</span> {
  <span class="hljs-comment">/* Disable default description field for checkbox:
   because other widgets do not have description fields,
   we add descriptions to each widget on the field level.
  */</span>
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: none;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-FormGroup-content</span> <span class="hljs-selector-id">#root__description</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: none;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-FormGroup-content</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-modifiedIndicator</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">width</span>: <span class="hljs-number">5px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-brand-color2);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin-top</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin-left</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">calc</span>(var(--jp-private-settingeditor-modifier-indent) * -<span class="hljs-number">1</span>);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">flex-shrink</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-FormGroup-content</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-modifiedIndicator</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-errorIndicator</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-error-color0);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin-right</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0.5em</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/* RJSF ARRAY style */</span>

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-arrayFieldWrapper</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">legend</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">font-size</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-content-font-size2);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-ui-font-color0);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">flex-basis</span>: <span class="hljs-number">100%</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding</span>: <span class="hljs-number">4px</span> <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">font-weight</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-content-heading-font-weight);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border-bottom</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1px</span> solid <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-border-color2);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-arrayFieldWrapper</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.field-description</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding</span>: <span class="hljs-number">4px</span> <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">white-space</span>: pre-wrap;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-arrayFieldWrapper</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.array-item</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">width</span>: <span class="hljs-number">100%</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1px</span> solid <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-border-color2);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border-radius</span>: <span class="hljs-number">4px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin</span>: <span class="hljs-number">4px</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-ArrayOperations</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: flex;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin-left</span>: <span class="hljs-number">8px</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-ArrayOperationsButton</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin</span>: <span class="hljs-number">2px</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-ArrayOperationsButton</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-icon3</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[fill]</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">fill</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-ui-font-color0);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-tag">button</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-ArrayOperationsButton</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-mod-styled</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:disabled</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">cursor</span>: not-allowed;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">opacity</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0.5</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/* RJSF form validation error */</span>

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-FormGroup-content</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.validationErrors</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-error-color0);
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/* Hide panel level error as duplicated the field level error */</span>
<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-FormGroup-content</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.panel</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.errors</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: none;
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/* RJSF normal content (settings-editor) */</span>

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-FormGroup-contentNormal</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: flex;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">align-items</span>: center;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">flex-wrap</span>: wrap;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-FormGroup-contentNormal</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-FormGroup-contentItem</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin-left</span>: <span class="hljs-number">7px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-ui-font-color0);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-FormGroup-contentNormal</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-FormGroup-description</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">flex-basis</span>: <span class="hljs-number">100%</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding</span>: <span class="hljs-number">4px</span> <span class="hljs-number">7px</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-FormGroup-contentNormal</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-FormGroup-default</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">flex-basis</span>: <span class="hljs-number">100%</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding</span>: <span class="hljs-number">4px</span> <span class="hljs-number">7px</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-FormGroup-contentNormal</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-FormGroup-fieldLabel</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">font-size</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-content-font-size1);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">font-weight</span>: normal;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">min-width</span>: <span class="hljs-number">120px</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-FormGroup-contentNormal</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">fieldset</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:not(</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:first-child)</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin-left</span>: <span class="hljs-number">7px</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-FormGroup-contentNormal</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.field-array-of-string</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.array-item</span> {
  <span class="hljs-comment">/* Display `jp-ArrayOperations` buttons side-by-side with content except
    for small screens where flex-wrap will place them one below the other.
  */</span>
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: flex;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">align-items</span>: center;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">flex-wrap</span>: wrap;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-FormGroup-contentNormal</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-objectFieldWrapper</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.form-group</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding</span>: <span class="hljs-number">2px</span> <span class="hljs-number">8px</span> <span class="hljs-number">2px</span> <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-private-settingeditor-modifier-indent);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin-top</span>: <span class="hljs-number">2px</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/* RJSF compact content (metadata-form) */</span>

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-FormGroup-content</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-FormGroup-contentCompact</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">width</span>: <span class="hljs-number">100%</span>;
}
