<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-FormGroup-contentCompact</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.form-group</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: flex;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0.5em</span> <span class="hljs-number">0.2em</span> <span class="hljs-number">0.5em</span> <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-FormGroup-contentCompact</span>
  <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-FormGroup-compactTitle</span>
  <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-FormGroup-description</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">font-size</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-ui-font-size1);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-ui-font-color2);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-FormGroup-contentCompact</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-FormGroup-fieldLabel</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding-bottom</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0.3em</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-FormGroup-contentCompact</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-inputFieldWrapper</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.form-control</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">width</span>: <span class="hljs-number">100%</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">box-sizing</span>: border-box;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-FormGroup-contentCompact</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-arrayFieldWrapper</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-FormGroup-compactTitle</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding-bottom</span>: <span class="hljs-number">7px</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-FormGroup-contentCompact</span>
  <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-objectFieldWrapper</span>
  <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-objectFieldWrapper</span>
  <span class="hljs-selector-class">.form-group</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding</span>: <span class="hljs-number">2px</span> <span class="hljs-number">8px</span> <span class="hljs-number">2px</span> <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-private-settingeditor-modifier-indent);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin-top</span>: <span class="hljs-number">2px</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-FormGroup-contentCompact</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">ul</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.error-detail</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin-block-start</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0.5em</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin-block-end</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0.5em</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding-inline-start</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1em</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/*
 * Copyright (c) Jupyter Development Team.
 * Distributed under the terms of the Modified BSD License.
 */</span>

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-SidePanel</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: flex;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">flex-direction</span>: column;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">min-width</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-sidebar-min-width);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">overflow-y</span>: auto;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-ui-font-color1);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-layout-color1);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">font-size</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-ui-font-size1);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-SidePanel-header</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">flex</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">0</span> auto;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: flex;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border-bottom</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-border-width) solid <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-border-color2);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">font-size</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-ui-font-size0);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">font-weight</span>: <span class="hljs-number">600</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">letter-spacing</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding</span>: <span class="hljs-number">2px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">text-transform</span>: uppercase;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-SidePanel-toolbar</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">flex</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">0</span> auto;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-SidePanel-content</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">flex</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1</span> <span class="hljs-number">1</span> auto;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-SidePanel-toolbar</span>,
<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-AccordionPanel-toolbar</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">height</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-private-toolbar-height);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-SidePanel-toolbar</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Toolbar-micro</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: none;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-AccordionPanel</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-AccordionPanel-title</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">box-sizing</span>: border-box;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">line-height</span>: <span class="hljs-number">25px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: flex;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">align-items</span>: center;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-layout-color1);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-ui-font-color1);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border-bottom</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-border-width) solid <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-toolbar-border-color);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">box-shadow</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-toolbar-box-shadow);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">font-size</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-ui-font-size0);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-AccordionPanel-title</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">cursor</span>: pointer;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">user-select</span>: none;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">-moz-user-select</span>: none;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">-webkit-user-select</span>: none;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">text-transform</span>: uppercase;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-AccordionPanel</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[data-orientation=<span class="hljs-string">'horizontal'</span>]</span> &gt; <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-AccordionPanel-title</span> {
  <span class="hljs-comment">/* Title is rotated for horizontal accordion panel using CSS */</span>
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: block;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">transform-origin</span>: top left;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">transform</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">rotate</span>(-<span class="hljs-number">90deg</span>) <span class="hljs-built_in">translate</span>(-<span class="hljs-number">100%</span>);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-AccordionPanel-title</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-AccordionPanel-titleLabel</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">user-select</span>: none;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">text-overflow</span>: ellipsis;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">white-space</span>: nowrap;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">overflow</span>: hidden;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-AccordionPanel-title</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-AccordionPanel-titleCollapser</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">transform</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">rotate</span>(-<span class="hljs-number">90deg</span>);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin</span>: auto <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">height</span>: <span class="hljs-number">16px</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-AccordionPanel-title</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-mod-expanded</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-AccordionPanel-titleCollapser</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">transform</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">rotate</span>(<span class="hljs-number">0deg</span>);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-AccordionPanel</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-AccordionPanel-toolbar</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background</span>: none;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">box-shadow</span>: none;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border</span>: none;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin-left</span>: auto;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-AccordionPanel</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-SplitPanel-handle</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:hover</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-layout-color3);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-text-truncated</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">overflow</span>: hidden;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">text-overflow</span>: ellipsis;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">white-space</span>: nowrap;
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/*-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
| Copyright (c) 2017, Jupyter Development Team.
|
| Distributed under the terms of the Modified BSD License.
|----------------------------------------------------------------------------*/</span>

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Spinner</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">position</span>: absolute;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: flex;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">justify-content</span>: center;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">align-items</span>: center;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">z-index</span>: <span class="hljs-number">10</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">left</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">top</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">width</span>: <span class="hljs-number">100%</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">height</span>: <span class="hljs-number">100%</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-layout-color0);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">outline</span>: none;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-SpinnerContent</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">font-size</span>: <span class="hljs-number">10px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin</span>: <span class="hljs-number">50px</span> auto;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">text-indent</span>: -<span class="hljs-number">9999em</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">width</span>: <span class="hljs-number">3em</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">height</span>: <span class="hljs-number">3em</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border-radius</span>: <span class="hljs-number">50%</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-brand-color3);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">linear-gradient</span>(
    to right,
    #f37626 <span class="hljs-number">10%</span>,
    rgba(<span class="hljs-number">255</span>, <span class="hljs-number">255</span>, <span class="hljs-number">255</span>, <span class="hljs-number">0</span>) <span class="hljs-number">42%</span>
  );
  <span class="hljs-attribute">position</span>: relative;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">animation</span>: load3 <span class="hljs-number">1s</span> infinite linear, fadeIn <span class="hljs-number">1s</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-SpinnerContent</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">::before</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">width</span>: <span class="hljs-number">50%</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">height</span>: <span class="hljs-number">50%</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background</span>: <span class="hljs-number">#f37626</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border-radius</span>: <span class="hljs-number">100%</span> <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">position</span>: absolute;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">top</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">left</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">content</span>: <span class="hljs-string">''</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-SpinnerContent</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">::after</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-layout-color0);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">width</span>: <span class="hljs-number">75%</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">height</span>: <span class="hljs-number">75%</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border-radius</span>: <span class="hljs-number">50%</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">content</span>: <span class="hljs-string">''</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin</span>: auto;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">position</span>: absolute;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">top</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">left</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">bottom</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">right</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-keyword">@keyframes</span> fadeIn {
  0% {
    <span class="hljs-attribute">opacity</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
  }

  100% {
    <span class="hljs-attribute">opacity</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1</span>;
  }
}

<span class="hljs-keyword">@keyframes</span> load3 {
  0% {
    <span class="hljs-attribute">transform</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">rotate</span>(<span class="hljs-number">0deg</span>);
  }

  100% {
    <span class="hljs-attribute">transform</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">rotate</span>(<span class="hljs-number">360deg</span>);
  }
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/*-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
| Copyright (c) 2014-2017, Jupyter Development Team.
|
| Distributed under the terms of the Modified BSD License.
|----------------------------------------------------------------------------*/</span>

<span class="hljs-selector-tag">button</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-mod-styled</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">font-size</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-ui-font-size1);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-ui-font-color0);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border</span>: none;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">box-sizing</span>: border-box;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">text-align</span>: center;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">line-height</span>: <span class="hljs-number">32px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">height</span>: <span class="hljs-number">32px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">12px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">letter-spacing</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0.8px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">outline</span>: none;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">appearance</span>: none;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">-webkit-appearance</span>: none;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">-moz-appearance</span>: none;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-tag">input</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-mod-styled</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-input-background);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">height</span>: <span class="hljs-number">28px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">box-sizing</span>: border-box;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-border-width) solid <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-border-color1);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding-left</span>: <span class="hljs-number">7px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding-right</span>: <span class="hljs-number">7px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">font-size</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-ui-font-size2);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-ui-font-color0);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">outline</span>: none;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">appearance</span>: none;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">-webkit-appearance</span>: none;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">-moz-appearance</span>: none;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-tag">input</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[type=<span class="hljs-string">'checkbox'</span>]</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-mod-styled</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">appearance</span>: checkbox;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">-webkit-appearance</span>: checkbox;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">-moz-appearance</span>: checkbox;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">height</span>: auto;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-tag">input</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-mod-styled</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:focus</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-border-width) solid <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--md-blue-<span class="hljs-number">500</span>);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">box-shadow</span>: inset <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">4px</span> <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--md-blue-<span class="hljs-number">300</span>);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-select-wrapper</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: flex;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">position</span>: relative;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">flex-direction</span>: column;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-layout-color1);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">box-sizing</span>: border-box;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin-bottom</span>: <span class="hljs-number">12px</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-select-wrapper</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:not(.multiple)</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">height</span>: <span class="hljs-number">28px</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-select-wrapper</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-mod-focused</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">select</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-mod-styled</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-border-width) solid <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-input-active-border-color);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">box-shadow</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-input-box-shadow);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-input-active-background);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-tag">select</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-mod-styled</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:hover</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">cursor</span>: pointer;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-ui-font-color0);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-input-hover-background);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">box-shadow</span>: inset <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">1px</span> <span class="hljs-built_in">rgba</span>(<span class="hljs-number">0</span>, <span class="hljs-number">0</span>, <span class="hljs-number">0</span>, <span class="hljs-number">0.5</span>);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-tag">select</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-mod-styled</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">flex</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1</span> <span class="hljs-number">1</span> auto;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">width</span>: <span class="hljs-number">100%</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">font-size</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-ui-font-size2);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-input-background);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-ui-font-color0);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">25px</span> <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">8px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-border-width) solid <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-input-border-color);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border-radius</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">outline</span>: none;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">appearance</span>: none;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">-webkit-appearance</span>: none;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">-moz-appearance</span>: none;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-tag">select</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-mod-styled</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:not(</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[multiple]</span>) {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">height</span>: <span class="hljs-number">32px</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-tag">select</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-mod-styled</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[multiple]</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">max-height</span>: <span class="hljs-number">200px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">overflow-y</span>: auto;
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/*-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
| Copyright (c) Jupyter Development Team.
| Distributed under the terms of the Modified BSD License.
|----------------------------------------------------------------------------*/</span>

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-switch</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: flex;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">align-items</span>: center;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding-left</span>: <span class="hljs-number">4px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding-right</span>: <span class="hljs-number">4px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">font-size</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-ui-font-size1);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-color</span>: transparent;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-ui-font-color1);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border</span>: none;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">height</span>: <span class="hljs-number">20px</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-switch</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:hover</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-layout-color2);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-switch-label</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin-right</span>: <span class="hljs-number">5px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">font-family</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-ui-font-family);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-switch-track</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">cursor</span>: pointer;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-switch-color, var(--jp-border-color1));
  <span class="hljs-attribute">-webkit-transition</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0.4s</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">transition</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0.4s</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border-radius</span>: <span class="hljs-number">34px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">height</span>: <span class="hljs-number">16px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">width</span>: <span class="hljs-number">35px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">position</span>: relative;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-switch-track</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">::before</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">content</span>: <span class="hljs-string">''</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">position</span>: absolute;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">height</span>: <span class="hljs-number">10px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">width</span>: <span class="hljs-number">10px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin</span>: <span class="hljs-number">3px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">left</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-ui-inverse-font-color1);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">-webkit-transition</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0.4s</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">transition</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0.4s</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border-radius</span>: <span class="hljs-number">50%</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-switch</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[aria-checked=<span class="hljs-string">'true'</span>]</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-switch-track</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-switch-true-position-color, var(--jp-warn-color0));
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-switch</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[aria-checked=<span class="hljs-string">'true'</span>]</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-switch-track</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">::before</span> {
  <span class="hljs-comment">/* track width (35) - margins (3 + 3) - thumb width (10) */</span>
  <span class="hljs-attribute">left</span>: <span class="hljs-number">19px</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/*-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
| Copyright (c) 2014-2016, Jupyter Development Team.
|
| Distributed under the terms of the Modified BSD License.
|----------------------------------------------------------------------------*/</span>

<span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:root</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-private-toolbar-height</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">calc</span>(
    <span class="hljs-number">28px</span> + var(--jp-border-width)
  ); <span class="hljs-comment">/* leave 28px for content */</span>
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Toolbar</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-ui-font-color1);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">flex</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">0</span> auto;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: flex;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">flex-direction</span>: row;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border-bottom</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-border-width) solid <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-toolbar-border-color);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">box-shadow</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-toolbar-box-shadow);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-toolbar-background);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">min-height</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-toolbar-micro-height);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding</span>: <span class="hljs-number">2px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">z-index</span>: <span class="hljs-number">8</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">overflow-x</span>: hidden;
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/* Toolbar items */</span>

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Toolbar</span> &gt; <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Toolbar-item</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Toolbar-spacer</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">flex-grow</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">flex-shrink</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Toolbar-item</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Toolbar-kernelStatus</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: inline-block;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">width</span>: <span class="hljs-number">32px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-repeat</span>: no-repeat;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-position</span>: center;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-size</span>: <span class="hljs-number">16px</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Toolbar</span> &gt; <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Toolbar-item</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">flex</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">0</span> auto;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: flex;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding-left</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding-right</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">font-size</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-ui-font-size1);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">line-height</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-private-toolbar-height);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">height</span>: <span class="hljs-number">100%</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/* Toolbar buttons */</span>

<span class="hljs-comment">/* This is the div we use to wrap the react component into a Widget */</span>
<span class="hljs-selector-tag">div</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-ToolbarButton</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">color</span>: transparent;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border</span>: none;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">box-sizing</span>: border-box;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">outline</span>: none;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">appearance</span>: none;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">-webkit-appearance</span>: none;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">-moz-appearance</span>: none;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-tag">button</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-ToolbarButtonComponent</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-layout-color1);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border</span>: none;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">box-sizing</span>: border-box;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">outline</span>: none;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">appearance</span>: none;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">-webkit-appearance</span>: none;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">-moz-appearance</span>: none;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">6px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">height</span>: <span class="hljs-number">24px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border-radius</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-border-radius);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: flex;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">align-items</span>: center;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">text-align</span>: center;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">font-size</span>: <span class="hljs-number">14px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">min-width</span>: unset;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">min-height</span>: unset;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-tag">button</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-ToolbarButtonComponent</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:disabled</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">opacity</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0.4</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-tag">button</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-ToolbarButtonComponent</span> &gt; <span class="hljs-selector-tag">span</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">flex</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">0</span> auto;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-tag">button</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-ToolbarButtonComponent</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-ToolbarButtonComponent-label</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">font-size</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-ui-font-size1);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">line-height</span>: <span class="hljs-number">100%</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding-left</span>: <span class="hljs-number">2px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-ui-font-color1);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">font-family</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-ui-font-family);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-id">#jp-main-dock-panel</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[data-mode=<span class="hljs-string">'single-document'</span>]</span>
  <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-MainAreaWidget</span>
  &gt; <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Toolbar</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Toolbar-micro</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">min-height</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-id">#jp-main-dock-panel</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[data-mode=<span class="hljs-string">'single-document'</span>]</span>
  <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-MainAreaWidget</span>
  &gt; <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Toolbar</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border</span>: none;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">box-shadow</span>: none;
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/*
 * Copyright (c) Jupyter Development Team.
 * Distributed under the terms of the Modified BSD License.
 */</span>

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-WindowedPanel-outer</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">position</span>: relative;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">overflow-y</span>: auto;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-WindowedPanel-inner</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">position</span>: relative;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-WindowedPanel-window</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">position</span>: absolute;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">left</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">right</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">overflow</span>: visible;
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/*-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
| Copyright (c) Jupyter Development Team.
| Distributed under the terms of the Modified BSD License.
|----------------------------------------------------------------------------*/</span>

<span class="hljs-comment">/* Sibling imports */</span>

<span class="hljs-selector-tag">body</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-ui-font-color1);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">font-size</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-ui-font-size1);
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/* Disable native link decoration styles everywhere outside of dialog boxes */</span>
<span class="hljs-selector-tag">a</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">text-decoration</span>: unset;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">color</span>: unset;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-tag">a</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:hover</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">text-decoration</span>: unset;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">color</span>: unset;
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/* Accessibility for links inside dialog box text */</span>
<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Dialog-content</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">a</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">text-decoration</span>: revert;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-content-link-color);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Dialog-content</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">a</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:hover</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">text-decoration</span>: revert;
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/* Styles for ui-components */</span>
<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Button</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-ui-font-color2);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border-radius</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-border-radius);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">12px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">font-size</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-ui-font-size1);

  <span class="hljs-comment">/* Copy from blueprint 3 */</span>
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: inline-flex;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">flex-direction</span>: row;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border</span>: none;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">cursor</span>: pointer;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">align-items</span>: center;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">justify-content</span>: center;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">text-align</span>: left;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">vertical-align</span>: middle;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">min-height</span>: <span class="hljs-number">30px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">min-width</span>: <span class="hljs-number">30px</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Button</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:disabled</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">cursor</span>: not-allowed;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Button</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:empty</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-meta">!important</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Button</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-mod-small</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">min-height</span>: <span class="hljs-number">24px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">min-width</span>: <span class="hljs-number">24px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">font-size</span>: <span class="hljs-number">12px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">7px</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/* Use our own theme for hover styles */</span>
<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Button</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-mod-minimal</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:hover</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-layout-color2);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Button</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-mod-minimal</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background</span>: none;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-InputGroup</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: block;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">position</span>: relative;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-InputGroup</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">input</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">box-sizing</span>: border-box;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border</span>: none;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border-radius</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-color</span>: transparent;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-ui-font-color0);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">box-shadow</span>: inset <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-border-width) <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-input-border-color);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding-bottom</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding-top</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding-left</span>: <span class="hljs-number">10px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding-right</span>: <span class="hljs-number">28px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">position</span>: relative;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">width</span>: <span class="hljs-number">100%</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">-webkit-appearance</span>: none;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">-moz-appearance</span>: none;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">appearance</span>: none;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">font-size</span>: <span class="hljs-number">14px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">font-weight</span>: <span class="hljs-number">400</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">height</span>: <span class="hljs-number">30px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">line-height</span>: <span class="hljs-number">30px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">outline</span>: none;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">vertical-align</span>: middle;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-InputGroup</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">input</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:focus</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">box-shadow</span>: inset <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-border-width)
      <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-input-active-box-shadow-color),
    inset <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">3px</span> <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-input-active-box-shadow-color);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-InputGroup</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">input</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:disabled</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">cursor</span>: not-allowed;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">resize</span>: block;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-layout-color2);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-ui-font-color2);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-InputGroup</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">input</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:disabled</span> ~ <span class="hljs-selector-tag">span</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">cursor</span>: not-allowed;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-ui-font-color2);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-InputGroup</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">input</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">::placeholder</span>,
<span class="hljs-selector-tag">input</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">::placeholder</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-ui-font-color2);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-InputGroupAction</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">position</span>: absolute;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">bottom</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">right</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding</span>: <span class="hljs-number">6px</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-HTMLSelect</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-DefaultStyle</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">select</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-color</span>: initial;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border</span>: none;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border-radius</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">box-shadow</span>: none;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-ui-font-color0);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: block;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">font-size</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-ui-font-size1);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">font-family</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-ui-font-family);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">height</span>: <span class="hljs-number">24px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">line-height</span>: <span class="hljs-number">14px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">25px</span> <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">10px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">text-align</span>: left;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">-moz-appearance</span>: none;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">-webkit-appearance</span>: none;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-HTMLSelect</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-DefaultStyle</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">select</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:disabled</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-layout-color2);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-ui-font-color2);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">cursor</span>: not-allowed;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">resize</span>: block;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-HTMLSelect</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-DefaultStyle</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">select</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:disabled</span> ~ <span class="hljs-selector-tag">span</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">cursor</span>: not-allowed;
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/* Use our own theme for hover and option styles */</span>
<span class="hljs-comment">/* stylelint-disable-next-line selector-max-type */</span>
<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-HTMLSelect</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-DefaultStyle</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">select</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:hover</span>,
<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-HTMLSelect</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-DefaultStyle</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">select</span> &gt; <span class="hljs-selector-tag">option</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-layout-color2);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-ui-font-color0);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-tag">select</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">box-sizing</span>: border-box;
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/*-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
| Copyright (c) Jupyter Development Team.
| Distributed under the terms of the Modified BSD License.
|----------------------------------------------------------------------------*/</span>

<span class="hljs-comment">/*-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
| Styles
|----------------------------------------------------------------------------*/</span>

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-StatusBar-Widget</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: flex;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">align-items</span>: center;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-layout-color2);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">min-height</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-statusbar-height);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">justify-content</span>: space-between;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">10px</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-StatusBar-Left</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: flex;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">align-items</span>: center;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">flex-direction</span>: row;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-StatusBar-Middle</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: flex;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">align-items</span>: center;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-StatusBar-Right</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: flex;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">align-items</span>: center;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">flex-direction</span>: row-reverse;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-StatusBar-Item</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">max-height</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-statusbar-height);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">2px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">height</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-statusbar-height);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">white-space</span>: nowrap;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">text-overflow</span>: ellipsis;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-ui-font-color1);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">6px</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-mod-highlighted</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:hover</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-layout-color3);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-mod-clicked</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-brand-color1);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-mod-clicked</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:hover</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-brand-color0);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-mod-clicked</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-StatusBar-TextItem</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-ui-inverse-font-color1);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-StatusBar-HoverItem</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">box-shadow</span>: <span class="hljs-string">'0px 4px 4px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.25)'</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-StatusBar-TextItem</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">font-size</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-ui-font-size1);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">font-family</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-ui-font-family);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">line-height</span>: <span class="hljs-number">24px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-ui-font-color1);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-StatusBar-GroupItem</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: flex;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">align-items</span>: center;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">flex-direction</span>: row;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Statusbar-ProgressCircle</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">svg</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: block;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span> auto;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">width</span>: <span class="hljs-number">16px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">height</span>: <span class="hljs-number">24px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">align-self</span>: normal;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Statusbar-ProgressCircle</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">path</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">fill</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-inverse-layout-color3);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Statusbar-ProgressBar-progress-bar</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">height</span>: <span class="hljs-number">10px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">width</span>: <span class="hljs-number">100px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border</span>: solid <span class="hljs-number">0.25px</span> <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-brand-color2);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border-radius</span>: <span class="hljs-number">3px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">overflow</span>: hidden;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">align-self</span>: center;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Statusbar-ProgressBar-progress-bar</span> &gt; <span class="hljs-selector-tag">div</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-brand-color2);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-image</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">linear-gradient</span>(
    -<span class="hljs-number">45deg</span>,
    rgba(<span class="hljs-number">255</span>, <span class="hljs-number">255</span>, <span class="hljs-number">255</span>, <span class="hljs-number">0.2</span>) <span class="hljs-number">25%</span>,
    transparent <span class="hljs-number">25%</span>,
    transparent <span class="hljs-number">50%</span>,
    <span class="hljs-built_in">rgba</span>(<span class="hljs-number">255</span>, <span class="hljs-number">255</span>, <span class="hljs-number">255</span>, <span class="hljs-number">0.2</span>) <span class="hljs-number">50%</span>,
    <span class="hljs-built_in">rgba</span>(<span class="hljs-number">255</span>, <span class="hljs-number">255</span>, <span class="hljs-number">255</span>, <span class="hljs-number">0.2</span>) <span class="hljs-number">75%</span>,
    transparent <span class="hljs-number">75%</span>,
    transparent
  );
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-size</span>: <span class="hljs-number">40px</span> <span class="hljs-number">40px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">float</span>: left;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">width</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0%</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">height</span>: <span class="hljs-number">100%</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">font-size</span>: <span class="hljs-number">12px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">line-height</span>: <span class="hljs-number">14px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">color</span>: <span class="hljs-number">#fff</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">text-align</span>: center;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">animation</span>: jp-Statusbar-ExecutionTime-progress-bar <span class="hljs-number">2s</span> linear infinite;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Statusbar-ProgressBar-progress-bar</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">p</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-ui-font-color1);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">font-family</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-ui-font-family);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">font-size</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-ui-font-size1);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">line-height</span>: <span class="hljs-number">10px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">width</span>: <span class="hljs-number">100px</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-keyword">@keyframes</span> jp-Statusbar-ExecutionTime-progress-bar {
  0% {
    <span class="hljs-attribute">background-position</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
  }

  100% {
    <span class="hljs-attribute">background-position</span>: <span class="hljs-number">40px</span> <span class="hljs-number">40px</span>;
  }
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/*-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
| Copyright (c) Jupyter Development Team.
| Distributed under the terms of the Modified BSD License.
|----------------------------------------------------------------------------*/</span>

<span class="hljs-comment">/*-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
| Variables
|----------------------------------------------------------------------------*/</span>

<span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:root</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-private-commandpalette-search-height</span>: <span class="hljs-number">28px</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/*-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
| Overall styles
|----------------------------------------------------------------------------*/</span>

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-CommandPalette</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding-bottom</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-ui-font-color1);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-layout-color1);

  <span class="hljs-comment">/* This is needed so that all font sizing of children done in ems is
   * relative to this base size */</span>
  <span class="hljs-attribute">font-size</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-ui-font-size1);
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/*-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
| Modal variant
|----------------------------------------------------------------------------*/</span>

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-ModalCommandPalette</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">position</span>: absolute;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">z-index</span>: <span class="hljs-number">10000</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">top</span>: <span class="hljs-number">38px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">left</span>: <span class="hljs-number">30%</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding</span>: <span class="hljs-number">4px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">width</span>: <span class="hljs-number">40%</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">box-shadow</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-elevation-z4);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border-radius</span>: <span class="hljs-number">4px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-layout-color0);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-ModalCommandPalette</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-CommandPalette</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">max-height</span>: <span class="hljs-number">40vh</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-ModalCommandPalette</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-CommandPalette</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-close-icon</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">::after</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: none;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-ModalCommandPalette</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-CommandPalette</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-CommandPalette-header</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: none;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-ModalCommandPalette</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-CommandPalette</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-CommandPalette-item</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin-left</span>: <span class="hljs-number">4px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin-right</span>: <span class="hljs-number">4px</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-ModalCommandPalette</span>
  <span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-CommandPalette</span>
  <span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-CommandPalette-item</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-mod-disabled</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: none;
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/*-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
| Search
|----------------------------------------------------------------------------*/</span>

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-CommandPalette-search</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding</span>: <span class="hljs-number">4px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-layout-color1);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">z-index</span>: <span class="hljs-number">2</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-CommandPalette-wrapper</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">overflow</span>: overlay;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">9px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-input-active-background);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">height</span>: <span class="hljs-number">30px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">box-shadow</span>: inset <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-border-width) <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-input-border-color);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-CommandPalette</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-mod-focused</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-CommandPalette-wrapper</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">box-shadow</span>: inset <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">1px</span> <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-input-active-box-shadow-color),
    inset <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">3px</span> <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-input-active-box-shadow-color);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-SearchIconGroup</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">color</span>: white;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-brand-color1);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">position</span>: absolute;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">top</span>: <span class="hljs-number">4px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">right</span>: <span class="hljs-number">4px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding</span>: <span class="hljs-number">5px</span> <span class="hljs-number">5px</span> <span class="hljs-number">1px</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-SearchIconGroup</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">svg</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">height</span>: <span class="hljs-number">20px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">width</span>: <span class="hljs-number">20px</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-SearchIconGroup</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-icon3</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[fill]</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">fill</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-layout-color0);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-CommandPalette-input</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background</span>: transparent;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">width</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">calc</span>(<span class="hljs-number">100%</span> - <span class="hljs-number">18px</span>);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">float</span>: left;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border</span>: none;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">outline</span>: none;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">font-size</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-ui-font-size1);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-ui-font-color0);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">line-height</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-private-commandpalette-search-height);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-CommandPalette-input</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">::-webkit-input-placeholder</span>,
<span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-CommandPalette-input</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">::-moz-placeholder</span>,
<span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-CommandPalette-input</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:-ms-input-placeholder</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-ui-font-color2);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">font-size</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-ui-font-size1);
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/*-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
| Results
|----------------------------------------------------------------------------*/</span>

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-CommandPalette-header</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:first-child</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin-top</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-CommandPalette-header</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border-bottom</span>: solid <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-border-width) <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-border-color2);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-ui-font-color1);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">cursor</span>: pointer;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: flex;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">font-size</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-ui-font-size0);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">font-weight</span>: <span class="hljs-number">600</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">letter-spacing</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin-top</span>: <span class="hljs-number">8px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding</span>: <span class="hljs-number">8px</span> <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">8px</span> <span class="hljs-number">12px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">text-transform</span>: uppercase;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-CommandPalette-header</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-mod-active</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-layout-color2);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-CommandPalette-header</span> &gt; <span class="hljs-selector-tag">mark</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-color</span>: transparent;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">font-weight</span>: bold;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-ui-font-color1);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-CommandPalette-item</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding</span>: <span class="hljs-number">4px</span> <span class="hljs-number">12px</span> <span class="hljs-number">4px</span> <span class="hljs-number">4px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-ui-font-color1);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">font-size</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-ui-font-size1);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">font-weight</span>: <span class="hljs-number">400</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: flex;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-CommandPalette-item</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-mod-disabled</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-ui-font-color2);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-CommandPalette-item</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-mod-active</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-ui-inverse-font-color1);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-brand-color1);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-CommandPalette-item</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-mod-active</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-CommandPalette-itemLabel</span> &gt; <span class="hljs-selector-tag">mark</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-ui-inverse-font-color0);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-CommandPalette-item</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-mod-active</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-icon-selectable</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[fill]</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">fill</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-layout-color0);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-CommandPalette-item</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-mod-active</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:hover</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:not(.lm-mod-disabled)</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-ui-inverse-font-color1);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-brand-color1);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-CommandPalette-item</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:hover</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:not(.lm-mod-active)</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:not(.lm-mod-disabled)</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-layout-color2);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-CommandPalette-itemContent</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">overflow</span>: hidden;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-CommandPalette-itemLabel</span> &gt; <span class="hljs-selector-tag">mark</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-ui-font-color0);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-color</span>: transparent;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">font-weight</span>: bold;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-CommandPalette-item</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-mod-disabled</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">mark</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-ui-font-color2);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-CommandPalette-item</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-CommandPalette-itemIcon</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">4px</span> <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">position</span>: relative;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">width</span>: <span class="hljs-number">16px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">top</span>: <span class="hljs-number">2px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">flex</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">0</span> auto;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-CommandPalette-item</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-mod-disabled</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-CommandPalette-itemIcon</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">opacity</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0.6</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-CommandPalette-item</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-CommandPalette-itemShortcut</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">flex</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">0</span> auto;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-CommandPalette-itemCaption</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: none;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-CommandPalette-content</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-layout-color1);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-CommandPalette-content</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:empty</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">::after</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">content</span>: <span class="hljs-string">'No results'</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin</span>: auto;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin-top</span>: <span class="hljs-number">20px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">width</span>: <span class="hljs-number">100px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: block;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">font-size</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-ui-font-size2);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">font-family</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-ui-font-family);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">font-weight</span>: lighter;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-CommandPalette-emptyMessage</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">text-align</span>: center;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin-top</span>: <span class="hljs-number">24px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">line-height</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1.32</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">8px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-content-font-color3);
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/*-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
| Copyright (c) 2014-2017, Jupyter Development Team.
|
| Distributed under the terms of the Modified BSD License.
|----------------------------------------------------------------------------*/</span>

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Dialog</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">position</span>: absolute;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">z-index</span>: <span class="hljs-number">10000</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: flex;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">flex-direction</span>: column;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">align-items</span>: center;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">justify-content</span>: center;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">top</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">left</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">width</span>: <span class="hljs-number">100%</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">height</span>: <span class="hljs-number">100%</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-dialog-background);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Dialog-content</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: flex;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">flex-direction</span>: column;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin-left</span>: auto;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin-right</span>: auto;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-layout-color1);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding</span>: <span class="hljs-number">24px</span> <span class="hljs-number">24px</span> <span class="hljs-number">12px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">min-width</span>: <span class="hljs-number">300px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">min-height</span>: <span class="hljs-number">150px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">max-width</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1000px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">max-height</span>: <span class="hljs-number">500px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">box-sizing</span>: border-box;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">box-shadow</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-elevation-z20);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">word-wrap</span>: break-word;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border-radius</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-border-radius);

  <span class="hljs-comment">/* This is needed so that all font sizing of children done in ems is
   * relative to this base size */</span>
  <span class="hljs-attribute">font-size</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-ui-font-size1);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-ui-font-color1);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">resize</span>: both;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Dialog-content</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Dialog-content-small</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">max-width</span>: <span class="hljs-number">500px</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Dialog-button</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">overflow</span>: visible;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-tag">button</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Dialog-button</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:focus</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">outline</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1px</span> solid <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-brand-color1);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">outline-offset</span>: <span class="hljs-number">4px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">-moz-outline-radius</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-tag">button</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Dialog-button</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:focus</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">::-moz-focus-inner</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-tag">button</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Dialog-button</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-mod-styled</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-mod-accept</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:focus</span>,
<span class="hljs-selector-tag">button</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Dialog-button</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-mod-styled</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-mod-warn</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:focus</span>,
<span class="hljs-selector-tag">button</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Dialog-button</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-mod-styled</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-mod-reject</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:focus</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">outline-offset</span>: <span class="hljs-number">4px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">-moz-outline-radius</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-tag">button</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Dialog-button</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-mod-styled</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-mod-accept</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:focus</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">outline</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1px</span> solid <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-accept-color-normal, var(--jp-brand-color1));
}

<span class="hljs-selector-tag">button</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Dialog-button</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-mod-styled</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-mod-warn</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:focus</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">outline</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1px</span> solid <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-warn-color-normal, var(--jp-error-color1));
}

<span class="hljs-selector-tag">button</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Dialog-button</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-mod-styled</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-mod-reject</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:focus</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">outline</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1px</span> solid <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-reject-color-normal, var(--md-grey-<span class="hljs-number">600</span>));
}

<span class="hljs-selector-tag">button</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Dialog-close-button</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">height</span>: <span class="hljs-number">100%</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">min-width</span>: unset;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">min-height</span>: unset;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Dialog-header</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: flex;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">justify-content</span>: space-between;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">flex</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">0</span> auto;
