  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding-bottom</span>: <span class="hljs-number">12px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">font-size</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-ui-font-size3);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">font-weight</span>: <span class="hljs-number">400</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-ui-font-color1);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Dialog-body</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: flex;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">flex-direction</span>: column;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">flex</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1</span> <span class="hljs-number">1</span> auto;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">font-size</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-ui-font-size1);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-layout-color1);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-ui-font-color1);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">overflow</span>: auto;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Dialog-footer</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: flex;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">flex-direction</span>: row;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">justify-content</span>: flex-end;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">align-items</span>: center;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">flex</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">0</span> auto;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin-left</span>: -<span class="hljs-number">12px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin-right</span>: -<span class="hljs-number">12px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding</span>: <span class="hljs-number">12px</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Dialog-checkbox</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding-right</span>: <span class="hljs-number">5px</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Dialog-checkbox</span> &gt; <span class="hljs-selector-tag">input</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:focus-visible</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">outline</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1px</span> solid <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-input-active-border-color);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">outline-offset</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1px</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Dialog-spacer</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">flex</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1</span> <span class="hljs-number">1</span> auto;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Dialog-title</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">overflow</span>: hidden;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">white-space</span>: nowrap;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">text-overflow</span>: ellipsis;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Dialog-body</span> &gt; <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-select-wrapper</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">width</span>: <span class="hljs-number">100%</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Dialog-body</span> &gt; <span class="hljs-selector-tag">button</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">16px</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Dialog-body</span> &gt; <span class="hljs-selector-tag">label</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">line-height</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1.4</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-ui-font-color0);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Dialog-button</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-mod-styled</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:not(</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:last-child)</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin-right</span>: <span class="hljs-number">12px</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/*
 * Copyright (c) Jupyter Development Team.
 * Distributed under the terms of the Modified BSD License.
 */</span>

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Input-Boolean-Dialog</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">flex-direction</span>: row-reverse;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">align-items</span>: end;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">width</span>: <span class="hljs-number">100%</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Input-Boolean-Dialog</span> &gt; <span class="hljs-selector-tag">label</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">flex</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1</span> <span class="hljs-number">1</span> auto;
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/*-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
| Copyright (c) 2014-2016, Jupyter Development Team.
|
| Distributed under the terms of the Modified BSD License.
|----------------------------------------------------------------------------*/</span>

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-MainAreaWidget</span> &gt; <span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:focus</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">outline</span>: none;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-MainAreaWidget</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-MainAreaWidget-error</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding</span>: <span class="hljs-number">6px</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-MainAreaWidget</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-MainAreaWidget-error</span> &gt; <span class="hljs-selector-tag">pre</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">width</span>: auto;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding</span>: <span class="hljs-number">10px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-error-color3);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-border-width) solid <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-error-color1);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border-radius</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-border-radius);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-ui-font-color1);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">font-size</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-ui-font-size1);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">white-space</span>: pre-wrap;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">word-wrap</span>: break-word;
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/*-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

<span class="hljs-comment">/*-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
| Copyright (c) Jupyter Development Team.
| Distributed under the terms of the Modified BSD License.
|----------------------------------------------------------------------------*/</span>

<span class="hljs-comment">/*-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
| RenderedText
|----------------------------------------------------------------------------*/</span>

<span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:root</span> {
  <span class="hljs-comment">/* This is the padding value to fill the gaps between lines containing spans with background color. */</span>
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-private-code-span-padding</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">calc</span>(
    (var(--jp-code-line-height) - <span class="hljs-number">1</span>) * <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-code-font-size) / <span class="hljs-number">2</span>
  );
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-RenderedText</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">text-align</span>: left;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding-left</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-code-padding);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">line-height</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-code-line-height);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">font-family</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-code-font-family);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-RenderedText</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">pre</span>,
<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-RenderedJavaScript</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">pre</span>,
<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-RenderedHTMLCommon</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">pre</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-content-font-color1);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">font-size</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-code-font-size);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border</span>: none;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-RenderedText</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">pre</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">a</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:link</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">text-decoration</span>: none;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-content-link-color);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-RenderedText</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">pre</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">a</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:hover</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">text-decoration</span>: underline;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-content-link-color);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-RenderedText</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">pre</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">a</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:visited</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">text-decoration</span>: none;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-content-link-color);
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/* console foregrounds and backgrounds */</span>
<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-RenderedText</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">pre</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.ansi-black-fg</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">color</span>: <span class="hljs-number">#3e424d</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-RenderedText</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">pre</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.ansi-red-fg</span> {

}

  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-private-code-span-padding) <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-RenderedText</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">pre</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.ansi-blue-intense-bg</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-color</span>: <span class="hljs-number">#0065ca</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-private-code-span-padding) <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-RenderedText</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">pre</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.ansi-magenta-intense-bg</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-color</span>: <span class="hljs-number">#a03196</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-private-code-span-padding) <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-RenderedText</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">pre</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.ansi-cyan-intense-bg</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-color</span>: <span class="hljs-number">#258f8f</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-private-code-span-padding) <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-RenderedText</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">pre</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.ansi-white-intense-bg</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-color</span>: <span class="hljs-number">#a1a6b2</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-private-code-span-padding) <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-RenderedText</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">pre</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.ansi-default-inverse-fg</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-ui-inverse-font-color0);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-RenderedText</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">pre</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.ansi-default-inverse-bg</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-inverse-layout-color0);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-private-code-span-padding) <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-RenderedText</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">pre</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.ansi-bold</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">font-weight</span>: bold;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-RenderedText</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">pre</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.ansi-underline</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">text-decoration</span>: underline;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-RenderedText</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[data-mime-type=<span class="hljs-string">'application/vnd.jupyter.stderr'</span>]</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-rendermime-error-background);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding-top</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-code-padding);
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/*-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
| RenderedLatex
|----------------------------------------------------------------------------*/</span>

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-RenderedLatex</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-content-font-color1);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">font-size</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-content-font-size1);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">line-height</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-content-line-height);
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/* Left-justify outputs.*/</span>
<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-OutputArea-output</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-RenderedLatex</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-code-padding);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">text-align</span>: left;
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/*-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
| RenderedHTML
|----------------------------------------------------------------------------*/</span>

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-RenderedHTMLCommon</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-content-font-color1);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">font-family</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-content-font-family);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">font-size</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-content-font-size1);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">line-height</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-content-line-height);

  <span class="hljs-comment">/* Give a bit more R padding on Markdown text to keep line lengths reasonable */</span>
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding-right</span>: <span class="hljs-number">20px</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-RenderedHTMLCommon</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">em</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">font-style</span>: italic;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-RenderedHTMLCommon</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">strong</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">font-weight</span>: bold;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-RenderedHTMLCommon</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">u</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">text-decoration</span>: underline;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-RenderedHTMLCommon</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">a</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:link</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">text-decoration</span>: none;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-content-link-color);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-RenderedHTMLCommon</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">a</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:hover</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">text-decoration</span>: underline;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-content-link-color);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-RenderedHTMLCommon</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">a</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:visited</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">text-decoration</span>: none;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-content-link-color);
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/* Headings */</span>

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-RenderedHTMLCommon</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">h1</span>,
<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-RenderedHTMLCommon</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">h2</span>,
<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-RenderedHTMLCommon</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">h3</span>,
<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-RenderedHTMLCommon</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">h4</span>,
<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-RenderedHTMLCommon</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">h5</span>,
<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-RenderedHTMLCommon</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">h6</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">line-height</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-content-heading-line-height);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">font-weight</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-content-heading-font-weight);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">font-style</span>: normal;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-content-heading-margin-top) <span class="hljs-number">0</span>
    <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-content-heading-margin-bottom) <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-RenderedHTMLCommon</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">h1</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:first-child</span>,
<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-RenderedHTMLCommon</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">h2</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:first-child</span>,
<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-RenderedHTMLCommon</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">h3</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:first-child</span>,
<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-RenderedHTMLCommon</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">h4</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:first-child</span>,
<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-RenderedHTMLCommon</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">h5</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:first-child</span>,
<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-RenderedHTMLCommon</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">h6</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:first-child</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin-top</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">calc</span>(<span class="hljs-number">0.5</span> * var(--jp-content-heading-margin-top));
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-RenderedHTMLCommon</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">h1</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:last-child</span>,
<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-RenderedHTMLCommon</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">h2</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:last-child</span>,
<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-RenderedHTMLCommon</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">h3</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:last-child</span>,
<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-RenderedHTMLCommon</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">h4</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:last-child</span>,
<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-RenderedHTMLCommon</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">h5</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:last-child</span>,
<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-RenderedHTMLCommon</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">h6</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:last-child</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin-bottom</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">calc</span>(<span class="hljs-number">0.5</span> * var(--jp-content-heading-margin-bottom));
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-RenderedHTMLCommon</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">h1</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">font-size</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-content-font-size5);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-RenderedHTMLCommon</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">h2</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">font-size</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-content-font-size4);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-RenderedHTMLCommon</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">h3</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">font-size</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-content-font-size3);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-RenderedHTMLCommon</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">h4</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">font-size</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-content-font-size2);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-RenderedHTMLCommon</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">h5</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">font-size</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-content-font-size1);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-RenderedHTMLCommon</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">h6</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">font-size</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-content-font-size0);
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/* Lists */</span>

<span class="hljs-comment">/* stylelint-disable selector-max-type, selector-max-compound-selectors */</span>

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-RenderedHTMLCommon</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">ul</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:not(.list-inline)</span>,
<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-RenderedHTMLCommon</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">ol</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:not(.list-inline)</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding-left</span>: <span class="hljs-number">2em</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-RenderedHTMLCommon</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">ul</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">list-style</span>: disc;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-RenderedHTMLCommon</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">ul</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">ul</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">list-style</span>: square;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-RenderedHTMLCommon</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">ul</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">ul</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">ul</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">list-style</span>: circle;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-RenderedHTMLCommon</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">ol</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">list-style</span>: decimal;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-RenderedHTMLCommon</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">ol</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">ol</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">list-style</span>: upper-alpha;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-RenderedHTMLCommon</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">ol</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">ol</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">ol</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">list-style</span>: lower-alpha;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-RenderedHTMLCommon</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">ol</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">ol</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">ol</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">ol</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">list-style</span>: lower-roman;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-RenderedHTMLCommon</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">ol</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">ol</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">ol</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">ol</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">ol</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">list-style</span>: decimal;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-RenderedHTMLCommon</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">ol</span>,
<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-RenderedHTMLCommon</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">ul</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin-bottom</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1em</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-RenderedHTMLCommon</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">ul</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">ul</span>,
<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-RenderedHTMLCommon</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">ul</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">ol</span>,
<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-RenderedHTMLCommon</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">ol</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">ul</span>,
<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-RenderedHTMLCommon</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">ol</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">ol</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin-bottom</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/* stylelint-enable selector-max-type, selector-max-compound-selectors */</span>

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-RenderedHTMLCommon</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">hr</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-border-color2);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-border-color1);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin-top</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1em</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin-bottom</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1em</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-RenderedHTMLCommon</span> &gt; <span class="hljs-selector-tag">pre</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1.5em</span> <span class="hljs-number">2em</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-RenderedHTMLCommon</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">pre</span>,
<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-RenderedHTMLCommon</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">code</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-layout-color0);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-content-font-color1);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">font-family</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-code-font-family);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">font-size</span>: inherit;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">line-height</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-code-line-height);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">white-space</span>: pre-wrap;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-RenderedHTMLCommon</span> <span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:not(pre)</span> &gt; <span class="hljs-selector-tag">code</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-layout-color2);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1px</span> <span class="hljs-number">5px</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/* Tables */</span>

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-RenderedHTMLCommon</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">table</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border-collapse</span>: collapse;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border-spacing</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border</span>: none;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-ui-font-color1);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">font-size</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-ui-font-size1);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">table-layout</span>: fixed;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin-left</span>: auto;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin-bottom</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1em</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin-right</span>: auto;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-RenderedHTMLCommon</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">thead</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border-bottom</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-border-width) solid <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-border-color1);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">vertical-align</span>: bottom;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-RenderedHTMLCommon</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">td</span>,
<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-RenderedHTMLCommon</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">th</span>,
<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-RenderedHTMLCommon</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">tr</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">vertical-align</span>: middle;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0.5em</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">line-height</span>: normal;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">white-space</span>: normal;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">max-width</span>: none;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border</span>: none;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-RenderedMarkdown</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-RenderedHTMLCommon</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">td</span>,
<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-RenderedMarkdown</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-RenderedHTMLCommon</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">th</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">max-width</span>: none;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:not(.jp-RenderedMarkdown).jp-RenderedHTMLCommon</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">td</span>,
<span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:not(.jp-RenderedMarkdown).jp-RenderedHTMLCommon</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">th</span>,
<span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:not(.jp-RenderedMarkdown).jp-RenderedHTMLCommon</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">tr</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">text-align</span>: right;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-RenderedHTMLCommon</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">th</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">font-weight</span>: bold;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-RenderedHTMLCommon</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">tbody</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">tr</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:nth-child(odd)</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-layout-color0);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-RenderedHTMLCommon</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">tbody</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">tr</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:nth-child(even)</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-rendermime-table-row-background);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-RenderedHTMLCommon</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">tbody</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">tr</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:hover</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-rendermime-table-row-hover-background);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-RenderedHTMLCommon</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">p</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">text-align</span>: left;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin-bottom</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1em</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-RenderedHTMLCommon</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">img</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">-moz-force-broken-image-icon</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/* Restrict to direct children as other images could be nested in other content. */</span>
<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-RenderedHTMLCommon</span> &gt; <span class="hljs-selector-tag">img</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: block;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin-left</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin-right</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin-bottom</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1em</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/* Change color behind transparent images if they need it... */</span>
<span class="hljs-selector-attr">[data-jp-theme-light=<span class="hljs-string">'false'</span>]</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-RenderedImage</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">img</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-needs-light-background</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-inverse-layout-color1);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-attr">[data-jp-theme-light=<span class="hljs-string">'true'</span>]</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-RenderedImage</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">img</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-needs-dark-background</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-inverse-layout-color1);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-RenderedHTMLCommon</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">img</span>,
<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-RenderedImage</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">img</span>,
<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-RenderedHTMLCommon</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">svg</span>,
<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-RenderedSVG</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">svg</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">max-width</span>: <span class="hljs-number">100%</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">height</span>: auto;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-RenderedHTMLCommon</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">img</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-mod-unconfined</span>,
<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-RenderedImage</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">img</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-mod-unconfined</span>,
<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-RenderedHTMLCommon</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">svg</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-mod-unconfined</span>,
<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-RenderedSVG</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">svg</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-mod-unconfined</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">max-width</span>: none;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-RenderedHTMLCommon</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.alert</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-notebook-padding);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-border-width) solid transparent;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border-radius</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-border-radius);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin-bottom</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1em</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-RenderedHTMLCommon</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.alert-info</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-info-color0);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-info-color3);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border-color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-info-color2);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-RenderedHTMLCommon</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.alert-info</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">hr</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border-color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-info-color3);
}

  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin-bottom</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-RenderedHTMLCommon</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.alert-warning</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-warn-color0);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-warn-color3);

  <span class="hljs-attribute">border-color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-error-color2);
}

  <span class="hljs-attribute">border-color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-error-color3);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-RenderedHTMLCommon</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.alert-danger</span> &gt; <span class="hljs-selector-tag">p</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:last-child</span>,

  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin-bottom</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-RenderedHTMLCommon</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">blockquote</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1em</span> <span class="hljs-number">2em</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">1em</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border-left</span>: <span class="hljs-number">5px</span> solid <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-border-color2);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-tag">a</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-InternalAnchorLink</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">visibility</span>: hidden;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin-left</span>: <span class="hljs-number">8px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--md-blue-<span class="hljs-number">800</span>);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-tag">h1</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:hover</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-InternalAnchorLink</span>,
<span class="hljs-selector-tag">h2</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:hover</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-InternalAnchorLink</span>,
<span class="hljs-selector-tag">h3</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:hover</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-InternalAnchorLink</span>,
<span class="hljs-selector-tag">h4</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:hover</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-InternalAnchorLink</span>,
<span class="hljs-selector-tag">h5</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:hover</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-InternalAnchorLink</span>,
<span class="hljs-selector-tag">h6</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:hover</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-InternalAnchorLink</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">visibility</span>: visible;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-RenderedHTMLCommon</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">kbd</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-rendermime-table-row-background);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1px</span> solid <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-border-color0);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border-bottom-color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-border-color2);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border-radius</span>: <span class="hljs-number">3px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">box-shadow</span>: inset <span class="hljs-number">0</span> -<span class="hljs-number">1px</span> <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-built_in">rgba</span>(<span class="hljs-number">0</span>, <span class="hljs-number">0</span>, <span class="hljs-number">0</span>, <span class="hljs-number">0.25</span>);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: inline-block;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">font-size</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-ui-font-size0);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">line-height</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1em</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0.2em</span> <span class="hljs-number">0.5em</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/* Most direct children of .jp-RenderedHTMLCommon have a margin-bottom of 1.0.
 * At the bottom of cells this is a bit too much as there is also spacing
 * between cells. Going all the way to 0 gets too tight between markdown and
 * code cells.
 */</span>
<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-RenderedHTMLCommon</span> &gt; *<span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:last-child</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin-bottom</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0.5em</span>;
}

 * Copyright (c) Jupyter Development Team.
 * Distributed under the terms of the Modified BSD License.
 */</span>

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-cursor-backdrop</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">position</span>: fixed;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">width</span>: <span class="hljs-number">200px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">height</span>: <span class="hljs-number">200px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin-top</span>: -<span class="hljs-number">100px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin-left</span>: -<span class="hljs-number">100px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">will-change</span>: transform;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">z-index</span>: <span class="hljs-number">100</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-mod-drag-image</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">will-change</span>: transform;
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/*
 * Copyright (c) Jupyter Development Team.
 * Distributed under the terms of the Modified BSD License.
 */</span>

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-lineFormSearch</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding</span>: <span class="hljs-number">4px</span> <span class="hljs-number">12px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-layout-color2);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">box-shadow</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-toolbar-box-shadow);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">z-index</span>: <span class="hljs-number">2</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">font-size</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-ui-font-size1);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-lineFormCaption</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">font-size</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-ui-font-size0);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">line-height</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-ui-font-size1);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin-top</span>: <span class="hljs-number">4px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-ui-font-color0);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-baseLineForm</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border</span>: none;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border-radius</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">position</span>: absolute;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-size</span>: <span class="hljs-number">16px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-repeat</span>: no-repeat;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-position</span>: center;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">outline</span>: none;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-lineFormButtonContainer</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">top</span>: <span class="hljs-number">4px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">right</span>: <span class="hljs-number">8px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">height</span>: <span class="hljs-number">24px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">12px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">width</span>: <span class="hljs-number">12px</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-lineFormButtonIcon</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">top</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">right</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-brand-color1);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">height</span>: <span class="hljs-number">100%</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">width</span>: <span class="hljs-number">100%</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">box-sizing</span>: border-box;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding</span>: <span class="hljs-number">4px</span> <span class="hljs-number">6px</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-lineFormButton</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">top</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">right</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-color</span>: transparent;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">height</span>: <span class="hljs-number">100%</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">width</span>: <span class="hljs-number">100%</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">box-sizing</span>: border-box;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-lineFormWrapper</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">overflow</span>: hidden;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">8px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1px</span> solid <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-border-color0);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-input-active-background);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">height</span>: <span class="hljs-number">22px</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-lineFormWrapperFocusWithin</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-border-width) solid <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--md-blue-<span class="hljs-number">500</span>);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">box-shadow</span>: inset <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">4px</span> <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--md-blue-<span class="hljs-number">300</span>);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-lineFormInput</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background</span>: transparent;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">width</span>: <span class="hljs-number">200px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">height</span>: <span class="hljs-number">100%</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border</span>: none;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">outline</span>: none;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-ui-font-color0);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">line-height</span>: <span class="hljs-number">28px</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-JSONEditor</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: flex;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">flex-direction</span>: column;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">width</span>: <span class="hljs-number">100%</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-JSONEditor-host</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">flex</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1</span> <span class="hljs-number">1</span> auto;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-border-width) solid <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-input-border-color);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border-radius</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-layout-color0);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">min-height</span>: <span class="hljs-number">50px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1px</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-JSONEditor</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-mod-error</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-JSONEditor-host</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border-color</span>: red;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">outline-color</span>: red;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-JSONEditor-header</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: flex;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">flex</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1</span> <span class="hljs-number">0</span> auto;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">12px</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-JSONEditor-header</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">label</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">flex</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">0</span> auto;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-JSONEditor-commitButton</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">height</span>: <span class="hljs-number">16px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">width</span>: <span class="hljs-number">16px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-size</span>: <span class="hljs-number">18px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-repeat</span>: no-repeat;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-position</span>: center;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-JSONEditor-host</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-mod-focused</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-input-active-background);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1px</span> solid <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-input-active-border-color);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">box-shadow</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-input-box-shadow);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Editor</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-mod-dropTarget</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-border-width) solid <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-input-active-border-color);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">box-shadow</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-input-box-shadow);
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/*-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
| Copyright (c) Jupyter Development Team.
| Distributed under the terms of the Modified BSD License.
|----------------------------------------------------------------------------*/</span>
<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-DocumentSearch-input</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border</span>: none;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">outline</span>: none;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-ui-font-color0);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">font-size</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-ui-font-size1);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-layout-color0);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">font-family</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-ui-font-family);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding</span>: <span class="hljs-number">2px</span> <span class="hljs-number">1px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">resize</span>: none;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-DocumentSearch-overlay</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">position</span>: absolute;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-toolbar-background);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border-bottom</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-border-width) solid <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-toolbar-border-color);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border-left</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-border-width) solid <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-toolbar-border-color);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">top</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">right</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">z-index</span>: <span class="hljs-number">7</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">min-width</span>: <span class="hljs-number">405px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding</span>: <span class="hljs-number">2px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">font-size</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-ui-font-size1);

  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-private-document-search-button-height</span>: <span class="hljs-number">20px</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-DocumentSearch-overlay</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">button</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-toolbar-background);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">outline</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-DocumentSearch-overlay</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">button</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:hover</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-layout-color2);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-DocumentSearch-overlay</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">button</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:active</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-layout-color3);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-DocumentSearch-overlay-row</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: flex;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">align-items</span>: center;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin-bottom</span>: <span class="hljs-number">2px</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-DocumentSearch-button-content</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: inline-block;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">cursor</span>: pointer;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">box-sizing</span>: border-box;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">width</span>: <span class="hljs-number">100%</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">height</span>: <span class="hljs-number">100%</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-DocumentSearch-button-content</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">svg</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">width</span>: <span class="hljs-number">100%</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">height</span>: <span class="hljs-number">100%</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-DocumentSearch-input-wrapper</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-border-width) solid <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-border-color0);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: flex;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-layout-color0);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin</span>: <span class="hljs-number">2px</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-DocumentSearch-input-wrapper</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:focus-within</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border-color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-cell-editor-active-border-color);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-DocumentSearch-toggle-wrapper</span>,
<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-DocumentSearch-button-wrapper</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">all</span>: initial;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">overflow</span>: hidden;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: inline-block;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border</span>: none;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">box-sizing</span>: border-box;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-DocumentSearch-toggle-wrapper</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">width</span>: <span class="hljs-number">14px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">height</span>: <span class="hljs-number">14px</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-DocumentSearch-button-wrapper</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">width</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-private-document-search-button-height);

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-DocumentSearch-toggle-wrapper</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:focus</span>,

  <span class="hljs-attribute">outline-offset</span>: -<span class="hljs-number">1px</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-DocumentSearch-toggle-wrapper</span>,
<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-DocumentSearch-button-wrapper</span>,

  <span class="hljs-attribute">outline</span>: none;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-DocumentSearch-toggle-placeholder</span> {

}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-DocumentSearch-input-button</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">::before</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: block;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding-top</span>: <span class="hljs-number">100%</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-DocumentSearch-input-button-off</span> {

}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-DocumentSearch-input-button-off</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:hover</span> {

}

  <span class="hljs-attribute">user-select</span>: none;

  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: inline-block;
}

  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding-right</span>: <span class="hljs-number">2px</span>;

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-DocumentSearch-spacer</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin-left</span>: auto;

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-DocumentSearch-filter-button</span> {

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-DocumentSearch-filter-button-enabled</span> {

}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-DocumentSearch-search-options</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">8px</span>;

  <span class="hljs-attribute">width</span>: <span class="hljs-number">100%</span>;

  <span class="hljs-attribute">justify-items</span>: stretch;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-DocumentSearch-search-filter-disabled</span> {

  <span class="hljs-attribute">user-select</span>: none;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-DocumentSearch-regex-error</span> {

}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-DocumentSearch-replace-button-wrapper</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">overflow</span>: hidden;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: inline-block;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">box-sizing</span>: border-box;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-border-width) solid <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-border-color0);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin</span>: auto <span class="hljs-number">2px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1px</span> <span class="hljs-number">4px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">height</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">calc</span>(var(--jp-private-document-search-button-height) + <span class="hljs-number">2px</span>);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-DocumentSearch-replace-button-wrapper</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:focus</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-border-width) solid <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-cell-editor-active-border-color);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-DocumentSearch-replace-button</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: inline-block;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">text-align</span>: center;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">cursor</span>: pointer;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">box-sizing</span>: border-box;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-ui-font-color1);

  <span class="hljs-comment">/* height - 2 * (padding of wrapper) */</span>
  <span class="hljs-attribute">line-height</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">calc</span>(var(--jp-private-document-search-button-height) - <span class="hljs-number">2px</span>);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">width</span>: <span class="hljs-number">100%</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">height</span>: <span class="hljs-number">100%</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-DocumentSearch-replace-button</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:focus</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">outline</span>: none;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-DocumentSearch-replace-wrapper-class</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin-left</span>: <span class="hljs-number">14px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: flex;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-DocumentSearch-replace-toggle</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border</span>: none;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-toolbar-background);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border-radius</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-border-radius);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-DocumentSearch-replace-toggle</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:hover</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-layout-color2);
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/*-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
| Copyright (c) Jupyter Development Team.

|----------------------------------------------------------------------------*/</span>

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.cm-editor</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">line-height</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-code-line-height);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">font-size</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-code-font-size);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">font-family</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-code-font-family);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border-radius</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">height</span>: auto;

  <span class="hljs-comment">/* Changed to auto to autogrow */</span>
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.cm-editor</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">pre</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-code-padding);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-CodeMirrorEditor</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[data-type=<span class="hljs-string">'inline'</span>]</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.cm-dialog</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-layout-color0);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-content-font-color1);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-CodeMirrorEditor</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">cursor</span>: text;
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/* When zoomed out 67% and 33% on a screen of 1440 width x 900 height */</span>
<span class="hljs-keyword">@media</span> screen <span class="hljs-keyword">and</span> (<span class="hljs-attribute">min-width:</span> <span class="hljs-number">2138px</span>) <span class="hljs-keyword">and</span> (<span class="hljs-attribute">max-width:</span> <span class="hljs-number">4319px</span>) {
  <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-CodeMirrorEditor</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[data-type=<span class="hljs-string">'inline'</span>]</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.cm-cursor</span> {
    <span class="hljs-attribute">border-left</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-code-cursor-width1) solid
      <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-editor-cursor-color);
  }
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/* When zoomed out less than 33% */</span>
<span class="hljs-keyword">@media</span> screen <span class="hljs-keyword">and</span> (<span class="hljs-attribute">min-width:</span> <span class="hljs-number">4320px</span>) {
  <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-CodeMirrorEditor</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[data-type=<span class="hljs-string">'inline'</span>]</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.cm-cursor</span> {
    <span class="hljs-attribute">border-left</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-code-cursor-width2) solid
      <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-editor-cursor-color);
  }
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.cm-editor</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-mod-readOnly</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.cm-cursor</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: none;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-CollaboratorCursor</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border-left</span>: <span class="hljs-number">5px</span> solid transparent;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border-right</span>: <span class="hljs-number">5px</span> solid transparent;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border-top</span>: none;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border-bottom</span>: <span class="hljs-number">3px</span> solid;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-clip</span>: content-box;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin-left</span>: -<span class="hljs-number">5px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin-right</span>: -<span class="hljs-number">5px</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.cm-searching</span>,
<span class="hljs-selector-class">.cm-searching</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">span</span> {
  <span class="hljs-comment">/* `.cm-searching span`: we need to override syntax highlighting */</span>
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-search-unselected-match-background-color);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-search-unselected-match-color);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.cm-searching</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">::selection</span>,
<span class="hljs-selector-class">.cm-searching</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">span</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">::selection</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-search-unselected-match-background-color);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-search-unselected-match-color);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-current-match</span> &gt; <span class="hljs-selector-class">.cm-searching</span>,
<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-current-match</span> &gt; <span class="hljs-selector-class">.cm-searching</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">span</span>,
<span class="hljs-selector-class">.cm-searching</span> &gt; <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-current-match</span>,
<span class="hljs-selector-class">.cm-searching</span> &gt; <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-current-match</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">span</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-search-selected-match-background-color);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-search-selected-match-color);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-current-match</span> &gt; <span class="hljs-selector-class">.cm-searching</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">::selection</span>,
<span class="hljs-selector-class">.cm-searching</span> &gt; <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-current-match</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">::selection</span>,
<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-current-match</span> &gt; <span class="hljs-selector-class">.cm-searching</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">span</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">::selection</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-search-selected-match-background-color);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-search-selected-match-color);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.cm-trailingspace</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-image</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">url</span>(data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAgAAAAFCAYAAAB4ka1VAAAAsElEQVQIHQGlAFr/AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA7+r3zKmT0/+pk9P/<span class="hljs-number">7</span>+r3zAAAAAAAAAAABAAAAAAAAAAA6OPzM+/q9wAAAAAA6OPzMwAAAAAAAAAAAgAAAAAAAAAAGR8NiRQaCgAZIA0AGR8NiQAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAQyoYJ/SY80UAAAAASUVORK5CYII=);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-position</span>: center left;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-repeat</span>: repeat-x;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-CollaboratorCursor-hover</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">position</span>: absolute;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">z-index</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">transform</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">translateX</span>(-<span class="hljs-number">50%</span>);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">color</span>: white;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border-radius</span>: <span class="hljs-number">3px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding-left</span>: <span class="hljs-number">4px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding-right</span>: <span class="hljs-number">4px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding-top</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding-bottom</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">text-align</span>: center;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">font-size</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-ui-font-size1);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">white-space</span>: nowrap;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-CodeMirror-ruler</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border-left</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1px</span> dashed <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-border-color2);
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/* Styles for shared cursors (remote cursor locations and selected ranges) */</span>
<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-CodeMirrorEditor</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.cm-ySelectionCaret</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">position</span>: relative;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border-left</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1px</span> solid black;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin-left</span>: -<span class="hljs-number">1px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin-right</span>: -<span class="hljs-number">1px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">box-sizing</span>: border-box;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-CodeMirrorEditor</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.cm-ySelectionCaret</span> &gt; <span class="hljs-selector-class">.cm-ySelectionInfo</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">white-space</span>: nowrap;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">position</span>: absolute;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">top</span>: -<span class="hljs-number">1.15em</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding-bottom</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0.05em</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">left</span>: -<span class="hljs-number">1px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">font-size</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0.95em</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">font-family</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-ui-font-family);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">font-weight</span>: bold;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">line-height</span>: normal;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">user-select</span>: none;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">color</span>: white;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding-left</span>: <span class="hljs-number">2px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding-right</span>: <span class="hljs-number">2px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">z-index</span>: <span class="hljs-number">101</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">transition</span>: opacity <span class="hljs-number">0.3s</span> ease-in-out;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-CodeMirrorEditor</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.cm-ySelectionInfo</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">transition-delay</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0.7s</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">opacity</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-CodeMirrorEditor</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.cm-ySelectionCaret</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:hover</span> &gt; <span class="hljs-selector-class">.cm-ySelectionInfo</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">opacity</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">transition-delay</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0s</span>;
}

  <span class="hljs-attribute">outline</span>: none;

<span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:root</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-private-filebrowser-button-height</span>: <span class="hljs-number">28px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-private-filebrowser-button-width</span>: <span class="hljs-number">48px</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/*-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

| Distributed under the terms of the Modified BSD License.
|----------------------------------------------------------------------------*/</span>

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-FileBrowser</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-SidePanel-content</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: flex;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">flex-direction</span>: column;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-FileBrowser-toolbar</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Toolbar</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">flex-wrap</span>: wrap;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">row-gap</span>: <span class="hljs-number">12px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border-bottom</span>: none;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">height</span>: auto;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin</span>: <span class="hljs-number">8px</span> <span class="hljs-number">12px</span> <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">box-shadow</span>: none;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">justify-content</span>: flex-start;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-FileBrowser-Panel</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">flex</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1</span> <span class="hljs-number">1</span> auto;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: flex;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">flex-direction</span>: column;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-BreadCrumbs</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">flex</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">0</span> auto;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin</span>: <span class="hljs-number">8px</span> <span class="hljs-number">12px</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-BreadCrumbs-item</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">2px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">2px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border-radius</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-border-radius);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">cursor</span>: pointer;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-BreadCrumbs-item</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:hover</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-layout-color2);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-BreadCrumbs-item</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:first-child</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin-left</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-BreadCrumbs-item</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-mod-dropTarget</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-brand-color2);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">opacity</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0.7</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/*-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
| Buttons
|----------------------------------------------------------------------------*/</span>

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-FileBrowser-toolbar</span> &gt; <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Toolbar-item</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">flex</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">0</span> auto;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding-left</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding-right</span>: <span class="hljs-number">2px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">align-items</span>: center;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">height</span>: unset;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-FileBrowser-toolbar</span> &gt; <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Toolbar-item</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-ToolbarButtonComponent</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">width</span>: <span class="hljs-number">40px</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/*-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
| Other styles
|----------------------------------------------------------------------------*/</span>

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-FileDialog</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-mod-conflict</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">input</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-error-color1);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-FileDialog</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-new-name-title</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin-top</span>: <span class="hljs-number">12px</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-LastModified-hidden</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: none;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-FileSize-hidden</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: none;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-FileBrowser</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-AccordionPanel</span> &gt; <span class="hljs-selector-tag">h3</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:first-child</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: none;
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/*-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
| DirListing
|----------------------------------------------------------------------------*/</span>

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-DirListing</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">flex</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1</span> <span class="hljs-number">1</span> auto;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: flex;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">flex-direction</span>: column;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">outline</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-DirListing-header</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">flex</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">0</span> auto;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: flex;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">flex-direction</span>: row;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">align-items</span>: center;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">overflow</span>: hidden;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border-top</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-border-width) solid <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-border-color2);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border-bottom</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-border-width) solid <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-border-color1);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">box-shadow</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-toolbar-box-shadow);
