  <span class="hljs-attribute">z-index</span>: <span class="hljs-number">2</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-DirListing-headerItem</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding</span>: <span class="hljs-number">4px</span> <span class="hljs-number">12px</span> <span class="hljs-number">2px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">font-weight</span>: <span class="hljs-number">500</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-DirListing-headerItem</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:hover</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-layout-color2);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-DirListing-headerItem</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-id-name</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">flex</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1</span> <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">84px</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-DirListing-headerItem</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-id-modified</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">flex</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">112px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border-left</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-border-width) solid <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-border-color2);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">text-align</span>: right;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-DirListing-headerItem</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-id-filesize</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">flex</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">75px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border-left</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-border-width) solid <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-border-color2);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">text-align</span>: right;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-id-narrow</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: none;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">flex</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">5px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding</span>: <span class="hljs-number">4px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border-left</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-border-width) solid <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-border-color2);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">text-align</span>: right;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-border-color2);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-DirListing-narrow</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-id-narrow</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: block;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-DirListing-narrow</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-id-modified</span>,
<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-DirListing-narrow</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-DirListing-itemModified</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: none;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-DirListing-headerItem</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-mod-selected</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">font-weight</span>: <span class="hljs-number">600</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/* increase specificity to override bundled default */</span>
<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-DirListing-content</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">flex</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1</span> <span class="hljs-number">1</span> auto;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">list-style-type</span>: none;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">overflow</span>: auto;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-layout-color1);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-DirListing-content</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">mark</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-ui-font-color0);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-color</span>: transparent;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">font-weight</span>: bold;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-DirListing-content</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-DirListing-item</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-mod-selected</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">mark</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-ui-inverse-font-color0);
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/* Style the directory listing content when a user drops a file to upload */</span>
<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-DirListing</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-mod-native-drop</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-DirListing-content</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">outline</span>: <span class="hljs-number">5px</span> dashed <span class="hljs-built_in">rgba</span>(<span class="hljs-number">128</span>, <span class="hljs-number">128</span>, <span class="hljs-number">128</span>, <span class="hljs-number">0.5</span>);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">outline-offset</span>: -<span class="hljs-number">10px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">cursor</span>: copy;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-DirListing-item</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: flex;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">flex-direction</span>: row;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">align-items</span>: center;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding</span>: <span class="hljs-number">4px</span> <span class="hljs-number">12px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">-webkit-user-select</span>: none;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">-moz-user-select</span>: none;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">-ms-user-select</span>: none;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">user-select</span>: none;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-DirListing-checkboxWrapper</span> {
  <span class="hljs-comment">/* Increases hit area of checkbox. */</span>
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding</span>: <span class="hljs-number">4px</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-DirListing-header</span>
  <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-DirListing-checkboxWrapper</span>
  + <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-DirListing-headerItem</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding-left</span>: <span class="hljs-number">4px</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-DirListing-content</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-DirListing-checkboxWrapper</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">position</span>: relative;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">left</span>: -<span class="hljs-number">4px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin</span>: -<span class="hljs-number">4px</span> <span class="hljs-number">0</span> -<span class="hljs-number">4px</span> -<span class="hljs-number">8px</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-DirListing-checkboxWrapper</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-mod-visible</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">visibility</span>: visible;
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/* For devices that support hovering, hide checkboxes until hovered, selected...
*/</span>
<span class="hljs-keyword">@media</span> (<span class="hljs-attribute">hover:</span> hover) {
  <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-DirListing-checkboxWrapper</span> {
    <span class="hljs-attribute">visibility</span>: hidden;
  }

  <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-DirListing-item</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:hover</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-DirListing-checkboxWrapper</span>,
  <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-DirListing-item</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-mod-selected</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-DirListing-checkboxWrapper</span> {
    <span class="hljs-attribute">visibility</span>: visible;
  }
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-DirListing-item</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[data-is-dot]</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">opacity</span>: <span class="hljs-number">75%</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-DirListing-item</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-mod-selected</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-ui-inverse-font-color1);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-brand-color1);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-DirListing-item</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-mod-dropTarget</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-brand-color3);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-DirListing-item</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:hover</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:not(.jp-mod-selected)</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-layout-color2);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-DirListing-itemIcon</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">flex</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">20px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin-right</span>: <span class="hljs-number">4px</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-DirListing-itemText</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">flex</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1</span> <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">64px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">white-space</span>: nowrap;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">overflow</span>: hidden;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">text-overflow</span>: ellipsis;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">user-select</span>: none;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-DirListing-itemText</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:focus</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">outline-width</span>: <span class="hljs-number">2px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">outline-color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-inverse-layout-color1);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">outline-style</span>: solid;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">outline-offset</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1px</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-DirListing-item</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-mod-selected</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-DirListing-itemText</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:focus</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">outline-color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-layout-color1);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-DirListing-itemModified</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">flex</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">125px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">text-align</span>: right;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-DirListing-itemFileSize</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">flex</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">90px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">text-align</span>: right;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-DirListing-editor</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">flex</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1</span> <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">64px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">outline</span>: none;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border</span>: none;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-ui-font-color1);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-layout-color1);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-DirListing-item</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-mod-running</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-DirListing-itemIcon</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">::before</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-success-color1);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">content</span>: <span class="hljs-string">'\25CF'</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">font-size</span>: <span class="hljs-number">8px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">position</span>: absolute;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">left</span>: -<span class="hljs-number">8px</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-DirListing-item</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-mod-running</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-mod-selected</span>
  <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-DirListing-itemIcon</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">::before</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-ui-inverse-font-color1);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-DirListing-item</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-mod-drag-image</span>,
<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-DirListing-item</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-mod-selected</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-mod-drag-image</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">font-size</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-ui-font-size1);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding-left</span>: <span class="hljs-number">4px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin-left</span>: <span class="hljs-number">4px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">width</span>: <span class="hljs-number">160px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-ui-inverse-font-color2);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">box-shadow</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-elevation-z2);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border-radius</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-ui-font-color1);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">transform</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">translateX</span>(-<span class="hljs-number">40%</span>) <span class="hljs-built_in">translateY</span>(-<span class="hljs-number">58%</span>);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Document</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">min-width</span>: <span class="hljs-number">120px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">min-height</span>: <span class="hljs-number">120px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">outline</span>: none;
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/*-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
| Copyright (c) Jupyter Development Team.
| Distributed under the terms of the Modified BSD License.
|----------------------------------------------------------------------------*/</span>

<span class="hljs-comment">/*-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
| Main OutputArea
| OutputArea has a list of Outputs
|----------------------------------------------------------------------------*/</span>

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-OutputArea</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">overflow-y</span>: auto;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-OutputArea-child</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: table;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">table-layout</span>: fixed;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">width</span>: <span class="hljs-number">100%</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">overflow</span>: hidden;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-OutputPrompt</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">width</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-cell-prompt-width);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-cell-outprompt-font-color);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">font-family</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-cell-prompt-font-family);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-code-padding);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">letter-spacing</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-cell-prompt-letter-spacing);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">line-height</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-code-line-height);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">font-size</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-code-font-size);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-border-width) solid transparent;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">opacity</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-cell-prompt-opacity);

  <span class="hljs-comment">/* Right align prompt text, don't wrap to handle large prompt numbers */</span>
  <span class="hljs-attribute">text-align</span>: right;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">white-space</span>: nowrap;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">overflow</span>: hidden;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">text-overflow</span>: ellipsis;

  <span class="hljs-comment">/* Disable text selection */</span>
  <span class="hljs-attribute">-webkit-user-select</span>: none;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">-moz-user-select</span>: none;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">-ms-user-select</span>: none;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">user-select</span>: none;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-OutputArea-prompt</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: table-cell;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">vertical-align</span>: top;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-OutputArea-output</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: table-cell;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">width</span>: <span class="hljs-number">100%</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">height</span>: auto;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">overflow</span>: auto;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">user-select</span>: text;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">-moz-user-select</span>: text;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">-webkit-user-select</span>: text;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">-ms-user-select</span>: text;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-OutputArea</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-RenderedText</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding-left</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1ch</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/**
 * Prompt overlay.
 */</span>

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-OutputArea-promptOverlay</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">position</span>: absolute;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">top</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">width</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-cell-prompt-width);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">height</span>: <span class="hljs-number">100%</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">opacity</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0.5</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-OutputArea-promptOverlay</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:hover</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-layout-color2);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">box-shadow</span>: inset <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">1px</span> <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-inverse-layout-color0);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">cursor</span>: zoom-out;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-mod-outputsScrolled</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-OutputArea-promptOverlay</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:hover</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">cursor</span>: zoom-in;
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/**
 * Isolated output.
 */</span>
<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-OutputArea-output</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-mod-isolated</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">width</span>: <span class="hljs-number">100%</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: block;
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/*
When drag events occur, `lm-mod-override-cursor` is added to the body.
Because iframes steal all cursor events, the following two rules are necessary
to suppress pointer events while resize drags are occurring. There may be a
better solution to this problem.
*/</span>
<span class="hljs-selector-tag">body</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-mod-override-cursor</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-OutputArea-output</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-mod-isolated</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">position</span>: relative;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-tag">body</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.lm-mod-override-cursor</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-OutputArea-output</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-mod-isolated</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">::before</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">content</span>: <span class="hljs-string">''</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">position</span>: absolute;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">top</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">left</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">right</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">bottom</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background</span>: transparent;
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/* pre */</span>

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-OutputArea-output</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">pre</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border</span>: none;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">overflow-x</span>: auto;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">overflow-y</span>: auto;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">word-break</span>: break-all;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">word-wrap</span>: break-word;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">white-space</span>: pre-wrap;
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/* tables */</span>

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-OutputArea-output</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-RenderedHTMLCommon</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">table</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin-left</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin-right</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/* description lists */</span>

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-OutputArea-output</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">dl</span>,
<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-OutputArea-output</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">dt</span>,
<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-OutputArea-output</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">dd</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: block;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-OutputArea-output</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">dl</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">width</span>: <span class="hljs-number">100%</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">overflow</span>: hidden;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-OutputArea-output</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">dt</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">font-weight</span>: bold;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">float</span>: left;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">width</span>: <span class="hljs-number">20%</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-OutputArea-output</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">dd</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">float</span>: left;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">width</span>: <span class="hljs-number">80%</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-TrimmedOutputs</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">pre</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-layout-color3);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">font-size</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">calc</span>(var(--jp-code-font-size) * <span class="hljs-number">1.4</span>);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">text-align</span>: center;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">text-transform</span>: uppercase;
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/* Hide the gutter in case of
 *  - nested output areas (e.g. in the case of output widgets)
 *  - mirrored output areas
 */</span>
<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-OutputArea</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-OutputArea</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-OutputArea-prompt</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: none;
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/* Hide empty lines in the output area, for instance due to cleared widgets */</span>
<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-OutputArea-prompt</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:empty</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/*-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
| executeResult is added to any Output-result for the display of the object
| returned by a cell
|----------------------------------------------------------------------------*/</span>

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-OutputArea-output</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-OutputArea-executeResult</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin-left</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">width</span>: <span class="hljs-number">100%</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/* Text output with the Out[] prompt needs a top padding to match the
 * alignment of the Out[] prompt itself.
 */</span>
<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-OutputArea-executeResult</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-RenderedText</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-OutputArea-output</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding-top</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-code-padding);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border-top</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-border-width) solid transparent;
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/*-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
| The Stdin output
|----------------------------------------------------------------------------*/</span>

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Stdin-prompt</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-content-font-color0);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding-right</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-code-padding);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">vertical-align</span>: baseline;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">flex</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">0</span> auto;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Stdin-input</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">font-family</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-code-font-family);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">font-size</span>: inherit;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">color</span>: inherit;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-color</span>: inherit;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">width</span>: <span class="hljs-number">42%</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">min-width</span>: <span class="hljs-number">200px</span>;

  <span class="hljs-comment">/* make sure input baseline aligns with prompt */</span>
  <span class="hljs-attribute">vertical-align</span>: baseline;

  <span class="hljs-comment">/* padding + margin = 0.5em between prompt and cursor */</span>
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">0.25em</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">0.25em</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">flex</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">70%</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Stdin-input</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">::placeholder</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">opacity</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Stdin-input</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:focus</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">box-shadow</span>: none;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Stdin-input</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:focus</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">::placeholder</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">opacity</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/*-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
| Output Area View
|----------------------------------------------------------------------------*/</span>

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-LinkedOutputView</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-OutputArea</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">height</span>: <span class="hljs-number">100%</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: block;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-LinkedOutputView</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-OutputArea-output</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:only-child</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">height</span>: <span class="hljs-number">100%</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/*-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
| Printing
|----------------------------------------------------------------------------*/</span>

<span class="hljs-keyword">@media</span> print {
  <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-OutputArea-child</span> {
    <span class="hljs-attribute">break-inside</span>: avoid-page;
  }
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/*-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
| Mobile
|----------------------------------------------------------------------------*/</span>
<span class="hljs-keyword">@media</span> <span class="hljs-keyword">only</span> screen <span class="hljs-keyword">and</span> (<span class="hljs-attribute">max-width:</span> <span class="hljs-number">760px</span>) {
  <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-OutputPrompt</span> {
    <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: table-row;
    <span class="hljs-attribute">text-align</span>: left;
  }

  <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-OutputArea-child</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-OutputArea-output</span> {
    <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: table-row;
    <span class="hljs-attribute">margin-left</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-notebook-padding);
  }
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/* Trimmed outputs warning */</span>
<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-TrimmedOutputs</span> &gt; <span class="hljs-selector-tag">a</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin</span>: <span class="hljs-number">10px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">text-decoration</span>: none;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">cursor</span>: pointer;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-TrimmedOutputs</span> &gt; <span class="hljs-selector-tag">a</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:hover</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">text-decoration</span>: none;
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/*-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
| Copyright (c) Jupyter Development Team.
| Distributed under the terms of the Modified BSD License.
|----------------------------------------------------------------------------*/</span>

<span class="hljs-comment">/*-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
| Table of Contents
|----------------------------------------------------------------------------*/</span>

<span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:root</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-private-toc-active-width</span>: <span class="hljs-number">4px</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-TableOfContents</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: flex;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">flex-direction</span>: column;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-layout-color1);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-ui-font-color1);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">font-size</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-ui-font-size1);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">height</span>: <span class="hljs-number">100%</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-TableOfContents-placeholder</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">text-align</span>: center;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-TableOfContents-placeholderContent</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-content-font-color2);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding</span>: <span class="hljs-number">8px</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-TableOfContents-placeholderContent</span> &gt; <span class="hljs-selector-tag">h3</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin-bottom</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-content-heading-margin-bottom);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-TableOfContents</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-SidePanel-content</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">overflow-y</span>: auto;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-TableOfContents-tree</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin</span>: <span class="hljs-number">4px</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-TableOfContents</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">ol</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">list-style-type</span>: none;
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/* stylelint-disable-next-line selector-max-type */</span>
<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-TableOfContents</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">li</span> &gt; <span class="hljs-selector-tag">ol</span> {
  <span class="hljs-comment">/* Align left border with triangle icon center */</span>
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding-left</span>: <span class="hljs-number">11px</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-TableOfContents-content</span> {
  <span class="hljs-comment">/* left margin for the active heading indicator */</span>
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-private-toc-active-width);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-layout-color1);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-tocItem</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">-webkit-user-select</span>: none;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">-moz-user-select</span>: none;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">-ms-user-select</span>: none;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">user-select</span>: none;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-tocItem-heading</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: flex;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">cursor</span>: pointer;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-tocItem-heading</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:hover</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-layout-color2);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-tocItem-content</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: block;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding</span>: <span class="hljs-number">4px</span> <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">white-space</span>: nowrap;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">text-overflow</span>: ellipsis;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">overflow-x</span>: hidden;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-tocItem-collapser</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">height</span>: <span class="hljs-number">20px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin</span>: <span class="hljs-number">2px</span> <span class="hljs-number">2px</span> <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background</span>: none;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border</span>: none;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">cursor</span>: pointer;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-tocItem-collapser</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:hover</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-layout-color3);
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/* Active heading indicator */</span>

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-tocItem-heading</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">::before</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">content</span>: <span class="hljs-string">' '</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background</span>: transparent;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">width</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-private-toc-active-width);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">height</span>: <span class="hljs-number">24px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">position</span>: absolute;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">left</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border-radius</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-border-radius);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-tocItem-heading</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-tocItem-active</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">::before</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-brand-color1);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-tocItem-heading</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:hover.jp-tocItem-active</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">::before</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-brand-color0);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">opacity</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/*-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
| Copyright (c) Jupyter Development Team.
| Distributed under the terms of the Modified BSD License.
|----------------------------------------------------------------------------*/</span>

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Collapser</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">flex</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-cell-collapser-width);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border</span>: none;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">outline</span>: none;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background</span>: transparent;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border-radius</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-border-radius);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">opacity</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Collapser-child</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: block;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">width</span>: <span class="hljs-number">100%</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">box-sizing</span>: border-box;

  <span class="hljs-comment">/* height: 100% doesn't work because the height of its parent is computed from content */</span>
  <span class="hljs-attribute">position</span>: absolute;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">top</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">bottom</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/*-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
| Printing
|----------------------------------------------------------------------------*/</span>

<span class="hljs-comment">/*
Hiding collapsers in print mode.

<span class="hljs-doctag">Note:</span> input and output wrappers have "display: block" propery in print mode.
*/</span>

<span class="hljs-keyword">@media</span> print {
  <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Collapser</span> {
    <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: none;
  }
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/*-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
| Copyright (c) Jupyter Development Team.
| Distributed under the terms of the Modified BSD License.
|----------------------------------------------------------------------------*/</span>

<span class="hljs-comment">/*-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
| Header/Footer
|----------------------------------------------------------------------------*/</span>

<span class="hljs-comment">/* Hidden by zero height by default */</span>
<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-CellHeader</span>,
<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-CellFooter</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">height</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">width</span>: <span class="hljs-number">100%</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border</span>: none;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">outline</span>: none;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background</span>: transparent;
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/*-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
| Copyright (c) Jupyter Development Team.
| Distributed under the terms of the Modified BSD License.
|----------------------------------------------------------------------------*/</span>

<span class="hljs-comment">/*-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
| Input
|----------------------------------------------------------------------------*/</span>

<span class="hljs-comment">/* All input areas */</span>
<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-InputArea</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: table;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">table-layout</span>: fixed;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">width</span>: <span class="hljs-number">100%</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">overflow</span>: hidden;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-InputArea-editor</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: table-cell;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">overflow</span>: hidden;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">vertical-align</span>: top;

  <span class="hljs-comment">/* This is the non-active, default styling */</span>
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-border-width) solid <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-cell-editor-border-color);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border-radius</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-cell-editor-background);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-InputPrompt</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: table-cell;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">vertical-align</span>: top;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">width</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-cell-prompt-width);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-cell-inprompt-font-color);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">font-family</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-cell-prompt-font-family);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-code-padding);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">letter-spacing</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-cell-prompt-letter-spacing);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">opacity</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-cell-prompt-opacity);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">line-height</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-code-line-height);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">font-size</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-code-font-size);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-border-width) solid transparent;

  <span class="hljs-comment">/* Right align prompt text, don't wrap to handle large prompt numbers */</span>
  <span class="hljs-attribute">text-align</span>: right;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">white-space</span>: nowrap;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">overflow</span>: hidden;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">text-overflow</span>: ellipsis;

  <span class="hljs-comment">/* Disable text selection */</span>
  <span class="hljs-attribute">-webkit-user-select</span>: none;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">-moz-user-select</span>: none;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">-ms-user-select</span>: none;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">user-select</span>: none;
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/*-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
| Mobile
|----------------------------------------------------------------------------*/</span>
<span class="hljs-keyword">@media</span> <span class="hljs-keyword">only</span> screen <span class="hljs-keyword">and</span> (<span class="hljs-attribute">max-width:</span> <span class="hljs-number">760px</span>) {
  <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-InputArea-editor</span> {
    <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: table-row;
    <span class="hljs-attribute">margin-left</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-notebook-padding);
  }

  <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-InputPrompt</span> {
    <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: table-row;
    <span class="hljs-attribute">text-align</span>: left;
  }
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/*-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
| Copyright (c) Jupyter Development Team.
| Distributed under the terms of the Modified BSD License.
|----------------------------------------------------------------------------*/</span>

<span class="hljs-comment">/*-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
| Placeholder
|----------------------------------------------------------------------------*/</span>

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Placeholder</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: table;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">table-layout</span>: fixed;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">width</span>: <span class="hljs-number">100%</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Placeholder-prompt</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: table-cell;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">box-sizing</span>: border-box;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Placeholder-content</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: table-cell;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding</span>: <span class="hljs-number">4px</span> <span class="hljs-number">6px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1px</span> solid transparent;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border-radius</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background</span>: none;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">box-sizing</span>: border-box;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">cursor</span>: pointer;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Placeholder-contentContainer</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: flex;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Placeholder-content</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:hover</span>,
<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-InputPlaceholder</span> &gt; <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Placeholder-content</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:hover</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border-color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-layout-color3);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Placeholder-content</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-MoreHorizIcon</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">width</span>: <span class="hljs-number">32px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">height</span>: <span class="hljs-number">16px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1px</span> solid transparent;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border-radius</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-border-radius);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Placeholder-content</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-MoreHorizIcon</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:hover</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1px</span> solid <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-border-color1);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">box-shadow</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">2px</span> <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-built_in">rgba</span>(<span class="hljs-number">0</span>, <span class="hljs-number">0</span>, <span class="hljs-number">0</span>, <span class="hljs-number">0.25</span>);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-layout-color0);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-PlaceholderText</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">white-space</span>: nowrap;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">overflow-x</span>: hidden;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-inverse-layout-color3);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">font-family</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-code-font-family);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-InputPlaceholder</span> &gt; <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Placeholder-content</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border-color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-cell-editor-border-color);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-cell-editor-background);
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/*-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
| Copyright (c) Jupyter Development Team.
| Distributed under the terms of the Modified BSD License.
|----------------------------------------------------------------------------*/</span>

<span class="hljs-comment">/*-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
| Private CSS variables
|----------------------------------------------------------------------------*/</span>

<span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:root</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-private-cell-scrolling-output-offset</span>: <span class="hljs-number">5px</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/*-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
| Cell
|----------------------------------------------------------------------------*/</span>

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Cell</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-cell-padding);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border</span>: none;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">outline</span>: none;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background</span>: transparent;
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/*-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
| Common input/output
|----------------------------------------------------------------------------*/</span>

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Cell-inputWrapper</span>,
<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Cell-outputWrapper</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: flex;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">flex-direction</span>: row;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;

  <span class="hljs-comment">/* Added to reveal the box-shadow on the input and output collapsers. */</span>
  <span class="hljs-attribute">overflow</span>: visible;
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/* Only input/output areas inside cells */</span>
<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Cell-inputArea</span>,
<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Cell-outputArea</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">flex</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1</span> <span class="hljs-number">1</span> auto;
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/*-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
| Collapser
|----------------------------------------------------------------------------*/</span>

<span class="hljs-comment">/* Make the output collapser disappear when there is not output, but do so
 * in a manner that leaves it in the layout and preserves its width.
 */</span>
<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Cell</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-mod-noOutputs</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Cell-outputCollapser</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border</span>: none <span class="hljs-meta">!important</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background</span>: transparent <span class="hljs-meta">!important</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Cell</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:not(.jp-mod-noOutputs)</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Cell-outputCollapser</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">min-height</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-cell-collapser-min-height);
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/*-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
| Output
|----------------------------------------------------------------------------*/</span>

<span class="hljs-comment">/* Put a space between input and output when there IS output */</span>
<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Cell</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:not(.jp-mod-noOutputs)</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Cell-outputWrapper</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin-top</span>: <span class="hljs-number">5px</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-CodeCell</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-mod-outputsScrolled</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Cell-outputArea</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">overflow-y</span>: auto;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">max-height</span>: <span class="hljs-number">24em</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin-left</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-private-cell-scrolling-output-offset);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">resize</span>: vertical;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-CodeCell</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-mod-outputsScrolled</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Cell-outputArea</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[style*=<span class="hljs-string">'height'</span>]</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">max-height</span>: unset;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-CodeCell</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-mod-outputsScrolled</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Cell-outputArea</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">::after</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">content</span>: <span class="hljs-string">' '</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">box-shadow</span>: inset <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">6px</span> <span class="hljs-number">2px</span> <span class="hljs-built_in">rgb</span>(<span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">0</span> / <span class="hljs-number">30%</span>);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">width</span>: <span class="hljs-number">100%</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">height</span>: <span class="hljs-number">100%</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">position</span>: sticky;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">bottom</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">top</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin-top</span>: -<span class="hljs-number">50%</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">float</span>: left;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: block;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">pointer-events</span>: none;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-CodeCell</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-mod-outputsScrolled</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-OutputArea-child</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding-top</span>: <span class="hljs-number">6px</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-CodeCell</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-mod-outputsScrolled</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-OutputArea-prompt</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">width</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">calc</span>(
    var(--jp-cell-prompt-width) - <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-private-cell-scrolling-output-offset)
  );
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-CodeCell</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-mod-outputsScrolled</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-OutputArea-promptOverlay</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">left</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">calc</span>(-<span class="hljs-number">1</span> * var(--jp-private-cell-scrolling-output-offset));
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/*-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
| CodeCell
|----------------------------------------------------------------------------*/</span>

<span class="hljs-comment">/*-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
| MarkdownCell
|----------------------------------------------------------------------------*/</span>

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-MarkdownOutput</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: table-cell;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">width</span>: <span class="hljs-number">100%</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin-top</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin-bottom</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding-left</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-code-padding);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-MarkdownOutput</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-RenderedHTMLCommon</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">overflow</span>: auto;
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/* collapseHeadingButton (show always if hiddenCellsButton is _not_ shown) */</span>
<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-collapseHeadingButton</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: flex;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">min-height</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-cell-collapser-min-height);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">font-size</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-code-font-size);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">position</span>: absolute;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-color</span>: transparent;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-size</span>: <span class="hljs-number">25px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-repeat</span>: no-repeat;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-position-x</span>: center;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-position-y</span>: top;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-image</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-icon-caret-down);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">right</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">top</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">bottom</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-collapseHeadingButton</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-mod-collapsed</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-image</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-icon-caret-right);
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/*
 set the container font size to match that of content
 so that the nested collapse buttons have the right size
*/</span>
<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-MarkdownCell</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-InputPrompt</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">font-size</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-content-font-size1);
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/*
  Align collapseHeadingButton with cell top header
  The font sizes are identical to the ones in packages/rendermime/style/base.css
*/</span>
<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-mod-rendered</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-collapseHeadingButton</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[data-heading-level=<span class="hljs-string">'1'</span>]</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">font-size</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-content-font-size5);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-position-y</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">calc</span>(<span class="hljs-number">0.3</span> * var(--jp-content-font-size5));
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-mod-rendered</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-collapseHeadingButton</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[data-heading-level=<span class="hljs-string">'2'</span>]</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">font-size</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-content-font-size4);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-position-y</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">calc</span>(<span class="hljs-number">0.3</span> * var(--jp-content-font-size4));
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-mod-rendered</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-collapseHeadingButton</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[data-heading-level=<span class="hljs-string">'3'</span>]</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">font-size</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-content-font-size3);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-position-y</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">calc</span>(<span class="hljs-number">0.3</span> * var(--jp-content-font-size3));
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-mod-rendered</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-collapseHeadingButton</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[data-heading-level=<span class="hljs-string">'4'</span>]</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">font-size</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-content-font-size2);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-position-y</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">calc</span>(<span class="hljs-number">0.3</span> * var(--jp-content-font-size2));
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-mod-rendered</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-collapseHeadingButton</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[data-heading-level=<span class="hljs-string">'5'</span>]</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">font-size</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-content-font-size1);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-position-y</span>: top;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-mod-rendered</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-collapseHeadingButton</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[data-heading-level=<span class="hljs-string">'6'</span>]</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">font-size</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-content-font-size0);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-position-y</span>: top;
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/* collapseHeadingButton (show only on (hover,active) if hiddenCellsButton is shown) */</span>
<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Notebook</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-mod-showHiddenCellsButton</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-collapseHeadingButton</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: none;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Notebook</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-mod-showHiddenCellsButton</span>
  <span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:is(.jp-MarkdownCell</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:hover</span>, <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-mod-active</span>)
  <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-collapseHeadingButton</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: flex;
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/* showHiddenCellsButton (only show if jp-mod-showHiddenCellsButton is set, which
is a consequence of the showHiddenCellsButton option in Notebook Settings)*/</span>
<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Notebook</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-mod-showHiddenCellsButton</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-showHiddenCellsButton</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin-left</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">calc</span>(var(--jp-cell-prompt-width) + <span class="hljs-number">2</span> * <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-code-padding));
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin-top</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-code-padding);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1px</span> solid <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-border-color2);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-border-color3) <span class="hljs-meta">!important</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-content-font-color0) <span class="hljs-meta">!important</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: flex;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Notebook</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-mod-showHiddenCellsButton</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-showHiddenCellsButton</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:hover</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-border-color2) <span class="hljs-meta">!important</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-showHiddenCellsButton</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: none;
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/*-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
| Printing
|----------------------------------------------------------------------------*/</span>

<span class="hljs-comment">/*
Using block instead of flex to allow the use of the break-inside CSS property for
cell outputs.
*/</span>

<span class="hljs-keyword">@media</span> print {
  <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Cell-inputWrapper</span>,
  <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Cell-outputWrapper</span> {
    <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: block;
  }
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/*-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
| Copyright (c) Jupyter Development Team.
| Distributed under the terms of the Modified BSD License.
|----------------------------------------------------------------------------*/</span>

<span class="hljs-comment">/*-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
| Copyright (c) Jupyter Development Team.
| Distributed under the terms of the Modified BSD License.
|----------------------------------------------------------------------------*/</span>

<span class="hljs-comment">/*-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
| Variables
|----------------------------------------------------------------------------*/</span>

<span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:root</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-notebook-toolbar-padding</span>: <span class="hljs-number">2px</span> <span class="hljs-number">5px</span> <span class="hljs-number">2px</span> <span class="hljs-number">2px</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/*-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

/*-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
| Styles
|----------------------------------------------------------------------------*/</span>

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-NotebookPanel-toolbar</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-notebook-toolbar-padding);

  <span class="hljs-comment">/* disable paint containment from lumino 2.0 default strict CSS containment */</span>
  <span class="hljs-attribute">contain</span>: style size <span class="hljs-meta">!important</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Toolbar-item</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Notebook-toolbarCellType</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-select-wrapper</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-mod-focused</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border</span>: none;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">box-shadow</span>: none;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Notebook-toolbarCellTypeDropdown</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">select</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">height</span>: <span class="hljs-number">24px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">font-size</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-ui-font-size1);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">line-height</span>: <span class="hljs-number">14px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border-radius</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: block;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Notebook-toolbarCellTypeDropdown</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">span</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">top</span>: <span class="hljs-number">5px</span> <span class="hljs-meta">!important</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Toolbar-responsive-popup</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">position</span>: absolute;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">height</span>: fit-content;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: flex;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">flex-direction</span>: row;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">flex-wrap</span>: wrap;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">justify-content</span>: flex-end;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border-bottom</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-border-width) solid <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-toolbar-border-color);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">box-shadow</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-toolbar-box-shadow);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-toolbar-background);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">min-height</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-toolbar-micro-height);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-notebook-toolbar-padding);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">z-index</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">right</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">top</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Toolbar</span> &gt; <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Toolbar-responsive-opener</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin-left</span>: auto;
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/*-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
| Copyright (c) Jupyter Development Team.
| Distributed under the terms of the Modified BSD License.
|----------------------------------------------------------------------------*/</span>

<span class="hljs-comment">/*-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
| Variables
|----------------------------------------------------------------------------*/</span>

<span class="hljs-comment">/*-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

/*-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
| Styles
|----------------------------------------------------------------------------*/</span>

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Notebook-ExecutionIndicator</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">position</span>: relative;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: inline-block;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">height</span>: <span class="hljs-number">100%</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">z-index</span>: <span class="hljs-number">9997</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Notebook-ExecutionIndicator-tooltip</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">visibility</span>: hidden;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">height</span>: auto;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">width</span>: max-content;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">width</span>: -moz-max-content;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-layout-color2);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-ui-font-color1);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">text-align</span>: justify;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border-radius</span>: <span class="hljs-number">6px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">5px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">position</span>: fixed;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: table;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Notebook-ExecutionIndicator-tooltip</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.up</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">transform</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">translateX</span>(-<span class="hljs-number">50%</span>) <span class="hljs-built_in">translateY</span>(-<span class="hljs-number">100%</span>) <span class="hljs-built_in">translateY</span>(-<span class="hljs-number">32px</span>);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Notebook-ExecutionIndicator-tooltip</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.down</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">transform</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">translateX</span>(calc(-<span class="hljs-number">100%</span> + <span class="hljs-number">16px</span>)) <span class="hljs-built_in">translateY</span>(<span class="hljs-number">5px</span>);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Notebook-ExecutionIndicator-tooltip</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.hidden</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: none;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Notebook-ExecutionIndicator</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:hover</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Notebook-ExecutionIndicator-tooltip</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">visibility</span>: visible;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Notebook-ExecutionIndicator</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">span</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">font-size</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-ui-font-size1);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">font-family</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-ui-font-family);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-ui-font-color1);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">line-height</span>: <span class="hljs-number">24px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: block;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Notebook-ExecutionIndicator-progress-bar</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: flex;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">justify-content</span>: center;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">height</span>: <span class="hljs-number">100%</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/*
 * Copyright (c) Jupyter Development Team.
 * Distributed under the terms of the Modified BSD License.
 */</span>

<span class="hljs-comment">/*
 * Execution indicator
 */</span>
<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-tocItem-content</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">::after</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">content</span>: <span class="hljs-string">''</span>;

  <span class="hljs-comment">/* Must be identical to form a circle */</span>
  <span class="hljs-attribute">width</span>: <span class="hljs-number">12px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">height</span>: <span class="hljs-number">12px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background</span>: none;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border</span>: none;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">position</span>: absolute;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">right</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-tocItem-content</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[data-running=<span class="hljs-string">'0'</span>]</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">::after</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border-radius</span>: <span class="hljs-number">50%</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-border-width) solid <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-inverse-layout-color3);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background</span>: none;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-tocItem-content</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[data-running=<span class="hljs-string">'1'</span>]</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">::after</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border-radius</span>: <span class="hljs-number">50%</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-border-width) solid <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-inverse-layout-color3);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-inverse-layout-color3);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-tocItem-content</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[data-running=<span class="hljs-string">'0'</span>]</span>,
<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-tocItem-content</span><span class="hljs-selector-attr">[data-running=<span class="hljs-string">'1'</span>]</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin-right</span>: <span class="hljs-number">12px</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/*
 * Copyright (c) Jupyter Development Team.
 * Distributed under the terms of the Modified BSD License.
 */</span>

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Notebook-footer</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">height</span>: <span class="hljs-number">27px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin-left</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">calc</span>(
    var(--jp-cell-prompt-width) + <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-cell-collapser-width) +
      <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-cell-padding)
  );
  <span class="hljs-attribute">width</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">calc</span>(
    <span class="hljs-number">100%</span> -
      (
        var(--jp-cell-prompt-width) + <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-cell-collapser-width) +
          <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-cell-padding) + <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-cell-padding)
      )
  );
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-border-width) solid <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-cell-editor-border-color);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-ui-font-color3);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin-top</span>: <span class="hljs-number">6px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background</span>: none;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">cursor</span>: pointer;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Notebook-footer</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:focus</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border-color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-cell-editor-active-border-color);
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/* For devices that support hovering, hide footer until hover */</span>
<span class="hljs-keyword">@media</span> (<span class="hljs-attribute">hover:</span> hover) {
  <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Notebook-footer</span> {
    <span class="hljs-attribute">opacity</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
  }
