  <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Notebook-footer</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:focus</span>,
  <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Notebook-footer</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:hover</span> {
    <span class="hljs-attribute">opacity</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1</span>;
  }
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/*-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
| Copyright (c) Jupyter Development Team.
| Distributed under the terms of the Modified BSD License.
|----------------------------------------------------------------------------*/</span>

<span class="hljs-comment">/*-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
| Imports
|----------------------------------------------------------------------------*/</span>

<span class="hljs-comment">/*-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
| CSS variables
|----------------------------------------------------------------------------*/</span>

<span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:root</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-side-by-side-output-size</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1</span>fr;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-side-by-side-resized-cell</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-side-by-side-output-size);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-private-notebook-dragImage-width</span>: <span class="hljs-number">304px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-private-notebook-dragImage-height</span>: <span class="hljs-number">36px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-private-notebook-selected-color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--md-blue-<span class="hljs-number">400</span>);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-private-notebook-active-color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--md-green-<span class="hljs-number">400</span>);
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/*-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
| Notebook
|----------------------------------------------------------------------------*/</span>

<span class="hljs-comment">/* stylelint-disable selector-max-class */</span>

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-NotebookPanel</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: block;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">height</span>: <span class="hljs-number">100%</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-NotebookPanel</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Document</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">min-width</span>: <span class="hljs-number">240px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">min-height</span>: <span class="hljs-number">120px</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Notebook</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-notebook-padding);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">outline</span>: none;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">overflow</span>: auto;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-layout-color0);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Notebook</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-mod-scrollPastEnd</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">::after</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: block;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">content</span>: <span class="hljs-string">''</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">min-height</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-notebook-scroll-padding);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-MainAreaWidget-ContainStrict</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Notebook</span> * {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">contain</span>: strict;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Notebook</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Cell</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">overflow</span>: visible;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Notebook</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Cell</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-InputPrompt</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">cursor</span>: move;
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/*-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
| Notebook state related styling
|
| The notebook and cells each have states, here are the possibilities:
|
| - Notebook
|   - Command
|   - Edit
| - Cell
|   - None
|   - Active (only one can be active)
|   - Selected (the cells actions are applied to)
|   - Multiselected (when multiple selected, the cursor)
|   - No outputs
|----------------------------------------------------------------------------*/</span>

<span class="hljs-comment">/* Command or edit modes */</span>

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Notebook</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Cell</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:not(.jp-mod-active)</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-InputPrompt</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">opacity</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-cell-prompt-not-active-opacity);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-cell-prompt-not-active-font-color);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Notebook</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Cell</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:not(.jp-mod-active)</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-OutputPrompt</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">opacity</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-cell-prompt-not-active-opacity);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-cell-prompt-not-active-font-color);
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/* cell is active */</span>
<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Notebook</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Cell</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-mod-active</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Collapser</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-brand-color1);
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/* cell is dirty */</span>
<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Notebook</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Cell</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-mod-dirty</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-InputPrompt</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-warn-color1);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Notebook</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Cell</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-mod-dirty</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-InputPrompt</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">::before</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-warn-color1);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">content</span>: <span class="hljs-string">'•'</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Notebook</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Cell</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-mod-active</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-mod-dirty</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Collapser</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-warn-color1);
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/* collapser is hovered */</span>
<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Notebook</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Cell</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Collapser</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:hover</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">box-shadow</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-elevation-z2);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-brand-color1);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">opacity</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-cell-collapser-not-active-hover-opacity);
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/* cell is active and collapser is hovered */</span>
<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Notebook</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Cell</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-mod-active</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Collapser</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:hover</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-brand-color0);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">opacity</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/* Command mode */</span>

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Notebook</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-mod-commandMode</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Cell</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-mod-selected</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-notebook-multiselected-color);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Notebook</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-mod-commandMode</span>
  <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Cell</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-mod-active</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-mod-selected</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:not(.jp-mod-multiSelected)</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background</span>: transparent;
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/* Edit mode */</span>

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Notebook</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-mod-editMode</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Cell</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-mod-active</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-InputArea-editor</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-border-width) solid <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-cell-editor-active-border-color);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">box-shadow</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-input-box-shadow);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-cell-editor-active-background);
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/*-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
| Notebook drag and drop
|----------------------------------------------------------------------------*/</span>

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Notebook-cell</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-mod-dropSource</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">opacity</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0.5</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Notebook-cell</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-mod-dropTarget</span>,
<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Notebook</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-mod-commandMode</span>
  <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Notebook-cell</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-mod-active</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-mod-selected</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-mod-dropTarget</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border-top-color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-private-notebook-selected-color);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border-top-style</span>: solid;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border-top-width</span>: <span class="hljs-number">2px</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-dragImage</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: block;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">flex-direction</span>: row;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">width</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-private-notebook-dragImage-width);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">height</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-private-notebook-dragImage-height);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-border-width) solid <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-cell-editor-border-color);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-cell-editor-background);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">overflow</span>: visible;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-dragImage-singlePrompt</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">box-shadow</span>: <span class="hljs-number">2px</span> <span class="hljs-number">2px</span> <span class="hljs-number">4px</span> <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-built_in">rgba</span>(<span class="hljs-number">0</span>, <span class="hljs-number">0</span>, <span class="hljs-number">0</span>, <span class="hljs-number">0.12</span>);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-dragImage</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-dragImage-content</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">flex</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1</span> <span class="hljs-number">1</span> auto;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">z-index</span>: <span class="hljs-number">2</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">font-size</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-code-font-size);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">font-family</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-code-font-family);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">line-height</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-code-line-height);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-code-padding);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-border-width) solid <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-cell-editor-border-color);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-cell-editor-background-color);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-content-font-color3);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">text-align</span>: left;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin</span>: <span class="hljs-number">4px</span> <span class="hljs-number">4px</span> <span class="hljs-number">4px</span> <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-dragImage</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-dragImage-prompt</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">flex</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">0</span> auto;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">min-width</span>: <span class="hljs-number">36px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-cell-inprompt-font-color);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-code-padding);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding-left</span>: <span class="hljs-number">12px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">font-family</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-cell-prompt-font-family);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">letter-spacing</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-cell-prompt-letter-spacing);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">line-height</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1.9</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">font-size</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-code-font-size);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-border-width) solid transparent;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-dragImage-multipleBack</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">z-index</span>: -<span class="hljs-number">1</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">position</span>: absolute;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">height</span>: <span class="hljs-number">32px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">width</span>: <span class="hljs-number">300px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">top</span>: <span class="hljs-number">8px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">left</span>: <span class="hljs-number">8px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-layout-color2);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-border-width) solid <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-input-border-color);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">box-shadow</span>: <span class="hljs-number">2px</span> <span class="hljs-number">2px</span> <span class="hljs-number">4px</span> <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-built_in">rgba</span>(<span class="hljs-number">0</span>, <span class="hljs-number">0</span>, <span class="hljs-number">0</span>, <span class="hljs-number">0.12</span>);
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/*-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
| Cell toolbar
|----------------------------------------------------------------------------*/</span>

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-NotebookTools</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: block;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">min-width</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-sidebar-min-width);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-ui-font-color1);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-layout-color1);

  <span class="hljs-comment">/* This is needed so that all font sizing of children done in ems is
    * relative to this base size */</span>
  <span class="hljs-attribute">font-size</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-ui-font-size1);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">overflow</span>: auto;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-ActiveCellTool</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding</span>: <span class="hljs-number">12px</span> <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: flex;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-ActiveCellTool-Content</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">flex</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1</span> <span class="hljs-number">1</span> auto;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-ActiveCellTool</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-ActiveCellTool-CellContent</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-cell-editor-background);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-border-width) solid <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-cell-editor-border-color);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border-radius</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">min-height</span>: <span class="hljs-number">29px</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-ActiveCellTool</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-InputPrompt</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">min-width</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">calc</span>(var(--jp-cell-prompt-width) * <span class="hljs-number">0.75</span>);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-ActiveCellTool-CellContent</span> &gt; <span class="hljs-selector-tag">pre</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding</span>: <span class="hljs-number">5px</span> <span class="hljs-number">4px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">white-space</span>: normal;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-MetadataEditorTool</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">flex-direction</span>: column;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding</span>: <span class="hljs-number">12px</span> <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-RankedPanel</span> &gt; <span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:not(</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:first-child)</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin-top</span>: <span class="hljs-number">12px</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-KeySelector</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">select</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-mod-styled</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">font-size</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-ui-font-size1);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-ui-font-color0);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-border-width) solid <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-border-color1);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-KeySelector</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">label</span>,
<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-MetadataEditorTool</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">label</span>,
<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-NumberSetter</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">label</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">line-height</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1.4</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-NotebookTools</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-select-wrapper</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin-top</span>: <span class="hljs-number">4px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin-bottom</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-NumberSetter</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">input</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">width</span>: <span class="hljs-number">100%</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin-top</span>: <span class="hljs-number">4px</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-NotebookTools</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Collapse</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin-top</span>: <span class="hljs-number">16px</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/*-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
| Presentation Mode (.jp-mod-presentationMode)
|----------------------------------------------------------------------------*/</span>

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-mod-presentationMode</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Notebook</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-content-font-size1</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-content-presentation-font-size1);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-code-font-size</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-code-presentation-font-size);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-mod-presentationMode</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Notebook</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Cell</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-InputPrompt</span>,
<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-mod-presentationMode</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Notebook</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Cell</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-OutputPrompt</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">flex</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">110px</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/*-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
| Side-by-side Mode (.jp-mod-sideBySide)
|----------------------------------------------------------------------------*/</span>
<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-mod-sideBySide</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Notebook</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Notebook-cell</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin-top</span>: <span class="hljs-number">3em</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin-bottom</span>: <span class="hljs-number">3em</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin-left</span>: <span class="hljs-number">5%</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin-right</span>: <span class="hljs-number">5%</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-mod-sideBySide</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Notebook</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-CodeCell</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: grid;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">grid-template-columns</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">minmax</span>(<span class="hljs-number">0</span>, <span class="hljs-number">1</span>fr) min-content <span class="hljs-built_in">minmax</span>(
      <span class="hljs-number">0</span>,
      var(--jp-side-by-side-output-size)
    );
  <span class="hljs-attribute">grid-template-rows</span>: auto <span class="hljs-built_in">minmax</span>(<span class="hljs-number">0</span>, <span class="hljs-number">1</span>fr) auto;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">grid-template-areas</span>:
    <span class="hljs-string">'header header header'</span>
    <span class="hljs-string">'input handle output'</span>
    <span class="hljs-string">'footer footer footer'</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-mod-sideBySide</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Notebook</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-CodeCell</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-mod-resizedCell</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">grid-template-columns</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">minmax</span>(<span class="hljs-number">0</span>, <span class="hljs-number">1</span>fr) min-content <span class="hljs-built_in">minmax</span>(
      <span class="hljs-number">0</span>,
      var(--jp-side-by-side-resized-cell)
    );
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-mod-sideBySide</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Notebook</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-CodeCell</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-CellHeader</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">grid-area</span>: header;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-mod-sideBySide</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Notebook</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-CodeCell</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Cell-inputWrapper</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">grid-area</span>: input;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-mod-sideBySide</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Notebook</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-CodeCell</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Cell-outputWrapper</span> {
  <span class="hljs-comment">/* overwrite the default margin (no vertical separation needed in side by side move */</span>
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin-top</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">grid-area</span>: output;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-mod-sideBySide</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Notebook</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-CodeCell</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-CellFooter</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">grid-area</span>: footer;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-mod-sideBySide</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Notebook</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-CodeCell</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-CellResizeHandle</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">grid-area</span>: handle;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">user-select</span>: none;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: block;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">height</span>: <span class="hljs-number">100%</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">cursor</span>: ew-resize;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-cell-padding);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-mod-sideBySide</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Notebook</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-CodeCell</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-CellResizeHandle</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">::after</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">content</span>: <span class="hljs-string">''</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: block;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-border-color2);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">height</span>: <span class="hljs-number">100%</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">width</span>: <span class="hljs-number">5px</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-mod-sideBySide</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Notebook</span>
  <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-CodeCell</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-mod-resizedCell</span>
  <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-CellResizeHandle</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">::after</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-border-color0);
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-CellResizeHandle</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: none;
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/*-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
| Placeholder
|----------------------------------------------------------------------------*/</span>

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Cell-Placeholder</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding-left</span>: <span class="hljs-number">55px</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Cell-Placeholder-wrapper</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background</span>: <span class="hljs-number">#fff</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1px</span> solid;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border-color</span>: <span class="hljs-number">#e5e6e9</span> <span class="hljs-number">#dfe0e4</span> <span class="hljs-number">#d0d1d5</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">border-radius</span>: <span class="hljs-number">4px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">-webkit-border-radius</span>: <span class="hljs-number">4px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin</span>: <span class="hljs-number">10px</span> <span class="hljs-number">15px</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Cell-Placeholder-wrapper-inner</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding</span>: <span class="hljs-number">15px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">position</span>: relative;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Cell-Placeholder-wrapper-body</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-repeat</span>: repeat;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-size</span>: <span class="hljs-number">50%</span> auto;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Cell-Placeholder-wrapper-body</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">div</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background</span>: <span class="hljs-number">#f6f7f8</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-image</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">-webkit-linear-gradient</span>(
    left,
    #f6f7f8 <span class="hljs-number">0%</span>,
    #edeef1 <span class="hljs-number">20%</span>,
    #f6f7f8 <span class="hljs-number">40%</span>,
    #f6f7f8 <span class="hljs-number">100%</span>
  );
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-repeat</span>: no-repeat;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">background-size</span>: <span class="hljs-number">800px</span> <span class="hljs-number">104px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">height</span>: <span class="hljs-number">104px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">position</span>: absolute;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">right</span>: <span class="hljs-number">15px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">left</span>: <span class="hljs-number">15px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">top</span>: <span class="hljs-number">15px</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-tag">div</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Cell-Placeholder-h1</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">top</span>: <span class="hljs-number">20px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">height</span>: <span class="hljs-number">20px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">left</span>: <span class="hljs-number">15px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">width</span>: <span class="hljs-number">150px</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-tag">div</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Cell-Placeholder-h2</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">left</span>: <span class="hljs-number">15px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">top</span>: <span class="hljs-number">50px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">height</span>: <span class="hljs-number">10px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">width</span>: <span class="hljs-number">100px</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-tag">div</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Cell-Placeholder-content-1</span>,
<span class="hljs-selector-tag">div</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Cell-Placeholder-content-2</span>,
<span class="hljs-selector-tag">div</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Cell-Placeholder-content-3</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">left</span>: <span class="hljs-number">15px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">right</span>: <span class="hljs-number">15px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">height</span>: <span class="hljs-number">10px</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-tag">div</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Cell-Placeholder-content-1</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">top</span>: <span class="hljs-number">100px</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-tag">div</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Cell-Placeholder-content-2</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">top</span>: <span class="hljs-number">120px</span>;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-tag">div</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Cell-Placeholder-content-3</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">top</span>: <span class="hljs-number">140px</span>;
}

</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">style</span>&gt;</span>
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">style</span> <span class="hljs-attr">type</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"text/css"</span>&gt;</span><span class="css">
<span class="hljs-comment">/*-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
| Copyright (c) Jupyter Development Team.
| Distributed under the terms of the Modified BSD License.
|----------------------------------------------------------------------------*/</span>

<span class="hljs-comment">/*
The following CSS variables define the main, public API for styling JupyterLab.
These variables should be used by all plugins wherever possible. In other
words, plugins should not define custom colors, sizes, etc unless absolutely
necessary. This enables users to change the visual theme of JupyterLab
by changing these variables.

Many variables appear in an ordered sequence (0,1,2,3). These sequences
are designed to work well together, so for example, `--jp-border-color1` should
be used with `--jp-layout-color1`. The numbers have the following meanings:

* 0: super-primary, reserved for special emphasis
* 1: primary, most important under normal situations
* 2: secondary, next most important under normal situations
* 3: tertiary, next most important under normal situations

Throughout JupyterLab, we are mostly following principles from Google's
Material Design when selecting colors. We are not, however, following
all of MD as it is not optimized for dense, information rich UIs.
*/</span>

<span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:root</span> {
  <span class="hljs-comment">/* Elevation
   *
   * We style box-shadows using Material Design's idea of elevation. These particular numbers are taken from here:
   *
   * https://github.com/material-components/material-components-web
   * https://material-components-web.appspot.com/elevation.html
   */</span>

  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-shadow-base-lightness</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-shadow-umbra-color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">rgba</span>(
    var(--jp-shadow-base-lightness),
    <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-shadow-base-lightness),
    <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-shadow-base-lightness),
    <span class="hljs-number">0.2</span>
  );
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-shadow-penumbra-color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">rgba</span>(
    var(--jp-shadow-base-lightness),
    <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-shadow-base-lightness),
    <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-shadow-base-lightness),
    <span class="hljs-number">0.14</span>
  );
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-shadow-ambient-color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">rgba</span>(
    var(--jp-shadow-base-lightness),
    <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-shadow-base-lightness),
    <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-shadow-base-lightness),
    <span class="hljs-number">0.12</span>
  );
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-elevation-z0</span>: none;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-elevation-z1</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">2px</span> <span class="hljs-number">1px</span> -<span class="hljs-number">1px</span> <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-shadow-umbra-color),
    <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">1px</span> <span class="hljs-number">1px</span> <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-shadow-penumbra-color),
    <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">1px</span> <span class="hljs-number">3px</span> <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-shadow-ambient-color);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-elevation-z2</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">3px</span> <span class="hljs-number">1px</span> -<span class="hljs-number">2px</span> <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-shadow-umbra-color),
    <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">2px</span> <span class="hljs-number">2px</span> <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-shadow-penumbra-color),
    <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">1px</span> <span class="hljs-number">5px</span> <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-shadow-ambient-color);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-elevation-z4</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">2px</span> <span class="hljs-number">4px</span> -<span class="hljs-number">1px</span> <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-shadow-umbra-color),
    <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">4px</span> <span class="hljs-number">5px</span> <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-shadow-penumbra-color),
    <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">1px</span> <span class="hljs-number">10px</span> <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-shadow-ambient-color);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-elevation-z6</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">3px</span> <span class="hljs-number">5px</span> -<span class="hljs-number">1px</span> <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-shadow-umbra-color),
    <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">6px</span> <span class="hljs-number">10px</span> <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-shadow-penumbra-color),
    <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">1px</span> <span class="hljs-number">18px</span> <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-shadow-ambient-color);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-elevation-z8</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">5px</span> <span class="hljs-number">5px</span> -<span class="hljs-number">3px</span> <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-shadow-umbra-color),
    <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">8px</span> <span class="hljs-number">10px</span> <span class="hljs-number">1px</span> <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-shadow-penumbra-color),
    <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">3px</span> <span class="hljs-number">14px</span> <span class="hljs-number">2px</span> <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-shadow-ambient-color);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-elevation-z12</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">7px</span> <span class="hljs-number">8px</span> -<span class="hljs-number">4px</span> <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-shadow-umbra-color),
    <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">12px</span> <span class="hljs-number">17px</span> <span class="hljs-number">2px</span> <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-shadow-penumbra-color),
    <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">5px</span> <span class="hljs-number">22px</span> <span class="hljs-number">4px</span> <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-shadow-ambient-color);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-elevation-z16</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">8px</span> <span class="hljs-number">10px</span> -<span class="hljs-number">5px</span> <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-shadow-umbra-color),
    <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">16px</span> <span class="hljs-number">24px</span> <span class="hljs-number">2px</span> <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-shadow-penumbra-color),
    <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">6px</span> <span class="hljs-number">30px</span> <span class="hljs-number">5px</span> <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-shadow-ambient-color);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-elevation-z20</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">10px</span> <span class="hljs-number">13px</span> -<span class="hljs-number">6px</span> <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-shadow-umbra-color),
    <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">20px</span> <span class="hljs-number">31px</span> <span class="hljs-number">3px</span> <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-shadow-penumbra-color),
    <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">8px</span> <span class="hljs-number">38px</span> <span class="hljs-number">7px</span> <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-shadow-ambient-color);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-elevation-z24</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">11px</span> <span class="hljs-number">15px</span> -<span class="hljs-number">7px</span> <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-shadow-umbra-color),
    <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">24px</span> <span class="hljs-number">38px</span> <span class="hljs-number">3px</span> <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-shadow-penumbra-color),
    <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">9px</span> <span class="hljs-number">46px</span> <span class="hljs-number">8px</span> <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-shadow-ambient-color);

  <span class="hljs-comment">/* Borders
   *
   * The following variables, specify the visual styling of borders in JupyterLab.
   */</span>

  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-border-width</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-border-color0</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--md-grey-<span class="hljs-number">400</span>);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-border-color1</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--md-grey-<span class="hljs-number">400</span>);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-border-color2</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--md-grey-<span class="hljs-number">300</span>);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-border-color3</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--md-grey-<span class="hljs-number">200</span>);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-inverse-border-color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--md-grey-<span class="hljs-number">600</span>);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-border-radius</span>: <span class="hljs-number">2px</span>;

  <span class="hljs-comment">/* UI Fonts
   *
   * The UI font CSS variables are used for the typography all of the JupyterLab
   * user interface elements that are not directly user generated content.
   *
   * The font sizing here is done assuming that the body font size of --jp-ui-font-size1
   * is applied to a parent element. When children elements, such as headings, are sized
   * in em all things will be computed relative to that body size.
   */</span>

  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-ui-font-scale-factor</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1.2</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-ui-font-size0</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0.83333em</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-ui-font-size1</span>: <span class="hljs-number">13px</span>; <span class="hljs-comment">/* Base font size */</span>
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-ui-font-size2</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1.2em</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-ui-font-size3</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1.44em</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-ui-font-family</span>: system-ui, -apple-system, blinkmacsystemfont, <span class="hljs-string">'Segoe UI'</span>,
    helvetica, arial, sans-serif, <span class="hljs-string">'Apple Color Emoji'</span>, <span class="hljs-string">'Segoe UI Emoji'</span>,
    <span class="hljs-string">'Segoe UI Symbol'</span>;

  <span class="hljs-comment">/*
   * Use these font colors against the corresponding main layout colors.
   * In a light theme, these go from dark to light.
   */</span>

  <span class="hljs-comment">/* Defaults use Material Design specification */</span>
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-ui-font-color0</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">rgba</span>(<span class="hljs-number">0</span>, <span class="hljs-number">0</span>, <span class="hljs-number">0</span>, <span class="hljs-number">1</span>);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-ui-font-color1</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">rgba</span>(<span class="hljs-number">0</span>, <span class="hljs-number">0</span>, <span class="hljs-number">0</span>, <span class="hljs-number">0.87</span>);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-ui-font-color2</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">rgba</span>(<span class="hljs-number">0</span>, <span class="hljs-number">0</span>, <span class="hljs-number">0</span>, <span class="hljs-number">0.54</span>);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-ui-font-color3</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">rgba</span>(<span class="hljs-number">0</span>, <span class="hljs-number">0</span>, <span class="hljs-number">0</span>, <span class="hljs-number">0.38</span>);

  <span class="hljs-comment">/*
   * Use these against the brand/accent/warn/error colors.
   * These will typically go from light to darker, in both a dark and light theme.
   */</span>

  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-ui-inverse-font-color0</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">rgba</span>(<span class="hljs-number">255</span>, <span class="hljs-number">255</span>, <span class="hljs-number">255</span>, <span class="hljs-number">1</span>);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-ui-inverse-font-color1</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">rgba</span>(<span class="hljs-number">255</span>, <span class="hljs-number">255</span>, <span class="hljs-number">255</span>, <span class="hljs-number">1</span>);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-ui-inverse-font-color2</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">rgba</span>(<span class="hljs-number">255</span>, <span class="hljs-number">255</span>, <span class="hljs-number">255</span>, <span class="hljs-number">0.7</span>);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-ui-inverse-font-color3</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">rgba</span>(<span class="hljs-number">255</span>, <span class="hljs-number">255</span>, <span class="hljs-number">255</span>, <span class="hljs-number">0.5</span>);

  <span class="hljs-comment">/* Content Fonts
   *
   * Content font variables are used for typography of user generated content.
   *
   * The font sizing here is done assuming that the body font size of --jp-content-font-size1
   * is applied to a parent element. When children elements, such as headings, are sized
   * in em all things will be computed relative to that body size.
   */</span>

  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-content-line-height</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1.6</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-content-font-scale-factor</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1.2</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-content-font-size0</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0.83333em</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-content-font-size1</span>: <span class="hljs-number">14px</span>; <span class="hljs-comment">/* Base font size */</span>
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-content-font-size2</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1.2em</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-content-font-size3</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1.44em</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-content-font-size4</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1.728em</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-content-font-size5</span>: <span class="hljs-number">2.0736em</span>;

  <span class="hljs-comment">/* This gives a magnification of about 125% in presentation mode over normal. */</span>
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-content-presentation-font-size1</span>: <span class="hljs-number">17px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-content-heading-line-height</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-content-heading-margin-top</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1.2em</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-content-heading-margin-bottom</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0.8em</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-content-heading-font-weight</span>: <span class="hljs-number">500</span>;

  <span class="hljs-comment">/* Defaults use Material Design specification */</span>
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-content-font-color0</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">rgba</span>(<span class="hljs-number">0</span>, <span class="hljs-number">0</span>, <span class="hljs-number">0</span>, <span class="hljs-number">1</span>);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-content-font-color1</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">rgba</span>(<span class="hljs-number">0</span>, <span class="hljs-number">0</span>, <span class="hljs-number">0</span>, <span class="hljs-number">0.87</span>);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-content-font-color2</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">rgba</span>(<span class="hljs-number">0</span>, <span class="hljs-number">0</span>, <span class="hljs-number">0</span>, <span class="hljs-number">0.54</span>);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-content-font-color3</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">rgba</span>(<span class="hljs-number">0</span>, <span class="hljs-number">0</span>, <span class="hljs-number">0</span>, <span class="hljs-number">0.38</span>);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-content-link-color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--md-blue-<span class="hljs-number">900</span>);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-content-font-family</span>: system-ui, -apple-system, blinkmacsystemfont,
    <span class="hljs-string">'Segoe UI'</span>, helvetica, arial, sans-serif, <span class="hljs-string">'Apple Color Emoji'</span>,
    <span class="hljs-string">'Segoe UI Emoji'</span>, <span class="hljs-string">'Segoe UI Symbol'</span>;

  <span class="hljs-comment">/*
   * Code Fonts
   *
   * Code font variables are used for typography of code and other monospaces content.
   */</span>

  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-code-font-size</span>: <span class="hljs-number">13px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-code-line-height</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1.3077</span>; <span class="hljs-comment">/* 17px for 13px base */</span>
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-code-padding</span>: <span class="hljs-number">5px</span>; <span class="hljs-comment">/* 5px for 13px base, codemirror highlighting needs integer px value */</span>
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-code-font-family-default</span>: menlo, consolas, <span class="hljs-string">'DejaVu Sans Mono'</span>, monospace;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-code-font-family</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-code-font-family-default);

  <span class="hljs-comment">/* This gives a magnification of about 125% in presentation mode over normal. */</span>
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-code-presentation-font-size</span>: <span class="hljs-number">16px</span>;

  <span class="hljs-comment">/* may need to tweak cursor width if you change font size */</span>
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-code-cursor-width0</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1.4px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-code-cursor-width1</span>: <span class="hljs-number">2px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-code-cursor-width2</span>: <span class="hljs-number">4px</span>;

  <span class="hljs-comment">/* Layout
   *
   * The following are the main layout colors use in JupyterLab. In a light
   * theme these would go from light to dark.
   */</span>

  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-layout-color0</span>: white;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-layout-color1</span>: white;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-layout-color2</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--md-grey-<span class="hljs-number">200</span>);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-layout-color3</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--md-grey-<span class="hljs-number">400</span>);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-layout-color4</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--md-grey-<span class="hljs-number">600</span>);

  <span class="hljs-comment">/* Inverse Layout
   *
   * The following are the inverse layout colors use in JupyterLab. In a light
   * theme these would go from dark to light.
   */</span>

  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-inverse-layout-color0</span>: <span class="hljs-number">#111</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-inverse-layout-color1</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--md-grey-<span class="hljs-number">900</span>);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-inverse-layout-color2</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--md-grey-<span class="hljs-number">800</span>);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-inverse-layout-color3</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--md-grey-<span class="hljs-number">700</span>);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-inverse-layout-color4</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--md-grey-<span class="hljs-number">600</span>);

  <span class="hljs-comment">/* Brand/accent */</span>

  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-brand-color0</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--md-blue-<span class="hljs-number">900</span>);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-brand-color1</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--md-blue-<span class="hljs-number">700</span>);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-brand-color2</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--md-blue-<span class="hljs-number">300</span>);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-brand-color3</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--md-blue-<span class="hljs-number">100</span>);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-brand-color4</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--md-blue-<span class="hljs-number">50</span>);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-accent-color0</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--md-green-<span class="hljs-number">900</span>);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-accent-color1</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--md-green-<span class="hljs-number">700</span>);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-accent-color2</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--md-green-<span class="hljs-number">300</span>);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-accent-color3</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--md-green-<span class="hljs-number">100</span>);

  <span class="hljs-comment">/* State colors (warn, error, success, info) */</span>

  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-warn-color0</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--md-orange-<span class="hljs-number">900</span>);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-warn-color1</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--md-orange-<span class="hljs-number">700</span>);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-warn-color2</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--md-orange-<span class="hljs-number">300</span>);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-warn-color3</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--md-orange-<span class="hljs-number">100</span>);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-error-color0</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--md-red-<span class="hljs-number">900</span>);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-error-color1</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--md-red-<span class="hljs-number">700</span>);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-error-color2</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--md-red-<span class="hljs-number">300</span>);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-error-color3</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--md-red-<span class="hljs-number">100</span>);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-success-color0</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--md-green-<span class="hljs-number">900</span>);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-success-color1</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--md-green-<span class="hljs-number">700</span>);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-success-color2</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--md-green-<span class="hljs-number">300</span>);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-success-color3</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--md-green-<span class="hljs-number">100</span>);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-info-color0</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--md-cyan-<span class="hljs-number">900</span>);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-info-color1</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--md-cyan-<span class="hljs-number">700</span>);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-info-color2</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--md-cyan-<span class="hljs-number">300</span>);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-info-color3</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--md-cyan-<span class="hljs-number">100</span>);

  <span class="hljs-comment">/* Cell specific styles */</span>

  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-cell-padding</span>: <span class="hljs-number">5px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-cell-collapser-width</span>: <span class="hljs-number">8px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-cell-collapser-min-height</span>: <span class="hljs-number">20px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-cell-collapser-not-active-hover-opacity</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0.6</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-cell-editor-background</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--md-grey-<span class="hljs-number">100</span>);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-cell-editor-border-color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--md-grey-<span class="hljs-number">300</span>);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-cell-editor-box-shadow</span>: inset <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">2px</span> <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--md-blue-<span class="hljs-number">300</span>);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-cell-editor-active-background</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-layout-color0);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-cell-editor-active-border-color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-brand-color1);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-cell-prompt-width</span>: <span class="hljs-number">64px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-cell-prompt-font-family</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-code-font-family-default);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-cell-prompt-letter-spacing</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-cell-prompt-opacity</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-cell-prompt-not-active-opacity</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0.5</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-cell-prompt-not-active-font-color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--md-grey-<span class="hljs-number">700</span>);

  <span class="hljs-comment">/* A custom blend of MD grey and blue 600
   * See https://meyerweb.com/eric/tools/color-blend/#546E7A:1E88E5:5:hex */</span>
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-cell-inprompt-font-color</span>: <span class="hljs-number">#307fc1</span>;

  <span class="hljs-comment">/* A custom blend of MD grey and orange 600
   * https://meyerweb.com/eric/tools/color-blend/#546E7A:F4511E:5:hex */</span>
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-cell-outprompt-font-color</span>: <span class="hljs-number">#bf5b3d</span>;

  <span class="hljs-comment">/* Notebook specific styles */</span>

  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-notebook-padding</span>: <span class="hljs-number">10px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-notebook-select-background</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-layout-color1);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-notebook-multiselected-color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--md-blue-<span class="hljs-number">50</span>);

  <span class="hljs-comment">/* The scroll padding is calculated to fill enough space at the bottom of the
  notebook to show one single-line cell (with appropriate padding) at the top
  when the notebook is scrolled all the way to the bottom. We also subtract one
  pixel so that no scrollbar appears if we have just one single-line cell in the
  notebook. This padding is to enable a 'scroll past end' feature in a notebook.
  */</span>
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-notebook-scroll-padding</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">calc</span>(
    <span class="hljs-number">100%</span> - var(--jp-code-font-size) * <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-code-line-height) -
      <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-code-padding) - <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-cell-padding) - <span class="hljs-number">1px</span>
  );

  <span class="hljs-comment">/* Rendermime styles */</span>

  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-rendermime-error-background</span>: <span class="hljs-number">#fdd</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-rendermime-table-row-background</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--md-grey-<span class="hljs-number">100</span>);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-rendermime-table-row-hover-background</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--md-light-blue-<span class="hljs-number">50</span>);

  <span class="hljs-comment">/* Dialog specific styles */</span>

  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-dialog-background</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">rgba</span>(<span class="hljs-number">0</span>, <span class="hljs-number">0</span>, <span class="hljs-number">0</span>, <span class="hljs-number">0.25</span>);

  <span class="hljs-comment">/* Console specific styles */</span>

  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-console-padding</span>: <span class="hljs-number">10px</span>;

  <span class="hljs-comment">/* Toolbar specific styles */</span>

  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-toolbar-border-color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-border-color1);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-toolbar-micro-height</span>: <span class="hljs-number">8px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-toolbar-background</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-layout-color1);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-toolbar-box-shadow</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">2px</span> <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-built_in">rgba</span>(<span class="hljs-number">0</span>, <span class="hljs-number">0</span>, <span class="hljs-number">0</span>, <span class="hljs-number">0.24</span>);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-toolbar-header-margin</span>: <span class="hljs-number">4px</span> <span class="hljs-number">4px</span> <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">4px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-toolbar-active-background</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--md-grey-<span class="hljs-number">300</span>);

  <span class="hljs-comment">/* Statusbar specific styles */</span>

  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-statusbar-height</span>: <span class="hljs-number">24px</span>;

  <span class="hljs-comment">/* Input field styles */</span>

  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-input-box-shadow</span>: inset <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">0</span> <span class="hljs-number">2px</span> <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--md-blue-<span class="hljs-number">300</span>);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-input-active-background</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-layout-color1);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-input-hover-background</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-layout-color1);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-input-background</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--md-grey-<span class="hljs-number">100</span>);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-input-border-color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-inverse-border-color);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-input-active-border-color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-brand-color1);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-input-active-box-shadow-color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">rgba</span>(<span class="hljs-number">19</span>, <span class="hljs-number">124</span>, <span class="hljs-number">189</span>, <span class="hljs-number">0.3</span>);

  <span class="hljs-comment">/* General editor styles */</span>

  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-editor-selected-background</span>: <span class="hljs-number">#d9d9d9</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-editor-selected-focused-background</span>: <span class="hljs-number">#d7d4f0</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-editor-cursor-color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-ui-font-color0);

  <span class="hljs-comment">/* Code mirror specific styles */</span>

  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-mirror-editor-keyword-color</span>: <span class="hljs-number">#008000</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-mirror-editor-atom-color</span>: <span class="hljs-number">#88f</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-mirror-editor-number-color</span>: <span class="hljs-number">#080</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-mirror-editor-def-color</span>: <span class="hljs-number">#00f</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-mirror-editor-variable-color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--md-grey-<span class="hljs-number">900</span>);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-mirror-editor-variable-2-color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">rgb</span>(<span class="hljs-number">0</span>, <span class="hljs-number">54</span>, <span class="hljs-number">109</span>);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-mirror-editor-variable-3-color</span>: <span class="hljs-number">#085</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-mirror-editor-punctuation-color</span>: <span class="hljs-number">#05a</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-mirror-editor-property-color</span>: <span class="hljs-number">#05a</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-mirror-editor-operator-color</span>: <span class="hljs-number">#a2f</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-mirror-editor-comment-color</span>: <span class="hljs-number">#408080</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-mirror-editor-string-color</span>: <span class="hljs-number">#ba2121</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-mirror-editor-string-2-color</span>: <span class="hljs-number">#708</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-mirror-editor-meta-color</span>: <span class="hljs-number">#a2f</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-mirror-editor-qualifier-color</span>: <span class="hljs-number">#555</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-mirror-editor-builtin-color</span>: <span class="hljs-number">#008000</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-mirror-editor-bracket-color</span>: <span class="hljs-number">#997</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-mirror-editor-tag-color</span>: <span class="hljs-number">#170</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-mirror-editor-attribute-color</span>: <span class="hljs-number">#00c</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-mirror-editor-header-color</span>: blue;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-mirror-editor-quote-color</span>: <span class="hljs-number">#090</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-mirror-editor-link-color</span>: <span class="hljs-number">#00c</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-mirror-editor-error-color</span>: <span class="hljs-number">#f00</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-mirror-editor-hr-color</span>: <span class="hljs-number">#999</span>;

  <span class="hljs-comment">/*
    RTC user specific colors.
    These colors are used for the cursor, username in the editor,
    and the icon of the user.
  */</span>

  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-collaborator-color1</span>: <span class="hljs-number">#ffad8e</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-collaborator-color2</span>: <span class="hljs-number">#dac83d</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-collaborator-color3</span>: <span class="hljs-number">#72dd76</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-collaborator-color4</span>: <span class="hljs-number">#00e4d0</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-collaborator-color5</span>: <span class="hljs-number">#45d4ff</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-collaborator-color6</span>: <span class="hljs-number">#e2b1ff</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-collaborator-color7</span>: <span class="hljs-number">#ff9de6</span>;

  <span class="hljs-comment">/* Vega extension styles */</span>

  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-vega-background</span>: white;

  <span class="hljs-comment">/* Sidebar-related styles */</span>

  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-sidebar-min-width</span>: <span class="hljs-number">250px</span>;

  <span class="hljs-comment">/* Search-related styles */</span>

  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-search-toggle-off-opacity</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0.5</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-search-toggle-hover-opacity</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0.8</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-search-toggle-on-opacity</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-search-selected-match-background-color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">rgb</span>(<span class="hljs-number">245</span>, <span class="hljs-number">200</span>, <span class="hljs-number">0</span>);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-search-selected-match-color</span>: black;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-search-unselected-match-background-color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(
    --jp-inverse-layout-color0
  );
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-search-unselected-match-color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-ui-inverse-font-color0);

  <span class="hljs-comment">/* Icon colors that work well with light or dark backgrounds */</span>
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-icon-contrast-color0</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--md-purple-<span class="hljs-number">600</span>);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-icon-contrast-color1</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--md-green-<span class="hljs-number">600</span>);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-icon-contrast-color2</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--md-pink-<span class="hljs-number">600</span>);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-icon-contrast-color3</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--md-blue-<span class="hljs-number">600</span>);

  <span class="hljs-comment">/* Button colors */</span>
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-accept-color-normal</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--md-blue-<span class="hljs-number">700</span>);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-accept-color-hover</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--md-blue-<span class="hljs-number">800</span>);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-accept-color-active</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--md-blue-<span class="hljs-number">900</span>);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-warn-color-normal</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--md-red-<span class="hljs-number">700</span>);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-warn-color-hover</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--md-red-<span class="hljs-number">800</span>);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-warn-color-active</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--md-red-<span class="hljs-number">900</span>);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-reject-color-normal</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--md-grey-<span class="hljs-number">600</span>);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-reject-color-hover</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--md-grey-<span class="hljs-number">700</span>);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-reject-color-active</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--md-grey-<span class="hljs-number">800</span>);

  <span class="hljs-comment">/* File or activity icons and switch semantic variables */</span>
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-jupyter-icon-color</span>: <span class="hljs-number">#f37626</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-notebook-icon-color</span>: <span class="hljs-number">#f37626</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-json-icon-color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--md-orange-<span class="hljs-number">700</span>);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-console-icon-background-color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--md-blue-<span class="hljs-number">700</span>);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-console-icon-color</span>: white;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-terminal-icon-background-color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--md-grey-<span class="hljs-number">800</span>);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-terminal-icon-color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--md-grey-<span class="hljs-number">200</span>);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-text-editor-icon-color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--md-grey-<span class="hljs-number">700</span>);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-inspector-icon-color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--md-grey-<span class="hljs-number">700</span>);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-switch-color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--md-grey-<span class="hljs-number">400</span>);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">--jp-switch-true-position-color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--md-orange-<span class="hljs-number">900</span>);
}
</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">style</span>&gt;</span>
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">style</span> <span class="hljs-attr">type</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"text/css"</span>&gt;</span><span class="css">
<span class="hljs-comment">/* Force rendering true colors when outputing to pdf */</span>
* {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">-webkit-print-color-adjust</span>: exact;
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/* Misc */</span>
<span class="hljs-selector-tag">a</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.anchor-link</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: none;
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/* Input area styling */</span>
<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-InputArea</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">overflow</span>: hidden;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-InputArea-editor</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">overflow</span>: hidden;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.cm-editor</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.cm-s-jupyter</span> <span class="hljs-selector-class">.highlight</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">pre</span> {
<span class="hljs-comment">/* weird, but --jp-code-padding defined to be 5px but 4px horizontal padding is hardcoded for pre.cm-line */</span>
  <span class="hljs-attribute">padding</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-code-padding) <span class="hljs-number">4px</span>;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">margin</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;

  <span class="hljs-attribute">font-family</span>: inherit;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">font-size</span>: inherit;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">line-height</span>: inherit;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">color</span>: inherit;

}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-OutputArea-output</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">pre</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">line-height</span>: inherit;
  <span class="hljs-attribute">font-family</span>: inherit;
}

<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-RenderedText</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">pre</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-content-font-color1);
  <span class="hljs-attribute">font-size</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-code-font-size);
}

<span class="hljs-comment">/* Hiding the collapser by default */</span>
<span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Collapser</span> {
  <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: none;
}

<span class="hljs-keyword">@page</span> {
    <span class="hljs-attribute">margin</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0.5in</span>; <span class="hljs-comment">/* Margin for each printed piece of paper */</span>
}

<span class="hljs-keyword">@media</span> print {
  <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Cell-inputWrapper</span>,
  <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Cell-outputWrapper</span> {
    <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: block;
  }
}
</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">style</span>&gt;</span>
<span class="hljs-comment">&lt;!-- Load mathjax --&gt;</span>
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">script</span> <span class="hljs-attr">src</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/mathjax/2.7.7/latest.js?config=TeX-AMS_CHTML-full,Safe"</span>&gt;</span> <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">script</span>&gt;</span>
<span class="hljs-comment">&lt;!-- MathJax configuration --&gt;</span>
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">script</span> <span class="hljs-attr">type</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"text/x-mathjax-config"</span>&gt;</span><span class="javascript">
    init_mathjax = <span class="hljs-function"><span class="hljs-keyword">function</span>(<span class="hljs-params"></span>) </span>{
        <span class="hljs-keyword">if</span> (<span class="hljs-built_in">window</span>.MathJax) {
        <span class="hljs-comment">// MathJax loaded</span>
            MathJax.Hub.Config({
                <span class="hljs-attr">TeX</span>: {
                    <span class="hljs-attr">equationNumbers</span>: {
                    <span class="hljs-attr">autoNumber</span>: <span class="hljs-string">"AMS"</span>,
                    <span class="hljs-attr">useLabelIds</span>: <span class="hljs-literal">true</span>
                    }
                },
                <span class="hljs-attr">tex2jax</span>: {
                    <span class="hljs-attr">inlineMath</span>: [ [<span class="hljs-string">'$'</span>,<span class="hljs-string">'$'</span>], [<span class="hljs-string">"\\("</span>,<span class="hljs-string">"\\)"</span>] ],
                    <span class="hljs-attr">displayMath</span>: [ [<span class="hljs-string">'$$'</span>,<span class="hljs-string">'$$'</span>], [<span class="hljs-string">"\\["</span>,<span class="hljs-string">"\\]"</span>] ],
                    <span class="hljs-attr">processEscapes</span>: <span class="hljs-literal">true</span>,
                    <span class="hljs-attr">processEnvironments</span>: <span class="hljs-literal">true</span>
                },
                <span class="hljs-attr">displayAlign</span>: <span class="hljs-string">'center'</span>,
                <span class="hljs-attr">messageStyle</span>: <span class="hljs-string">'none'</span>,
                <span class="hljs-attr">CommonHTML</span>: {
                    <span class="hljs-attr">linebreaks</span>: {
