                    <span class="hljs-attr">automatic</span>: <span class="hljs-literal">true</span>
                    }
                }
            });

            MathJax.Hub.Queue([<span class="hljs-string">"Typeset"</span>, MathJax.Hub]);
        }
    }
    init_mathjax();
    </span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">script</span>&gt;</span>
<span class="hljs-comment">&lt;!-- End of mathjax configuration --&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">script</span> <span class="hljs-attr">type</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"module"</span>&gt;</span><span class="javascript">
  <span class="hljs-built_in">document</span>.addEventListener(<span class="hljs-string">"DOMContentLoaded"</span>, <span class="hljs-keyword">async</span> () =&gt; {
    <span class="hljs-keyword">const</span> diagrams = <span class="hljs-built_in">document</span>.querySelectorAll(<span class="hljs-string">".jp-Mermaid &gt; pre.mermaid"</span>);
    <span class="hljs-comment">// do not load mermaidjs if not needed</span>
    <span class="hljs-keyword">if</span> (!diagrams.length) {
      <span class="hljs-keyword">return</span>;
    }
    <span class="hljs-keyword">const</span> mermaid = (<span class="hljs-keyword">await</span> <span class="hljs-keyword">import</span>(<span class="hljs-string">"https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/mermaid/10.7.0/mermaid.esm.min.mjs"</span>)).default;
    <span class="hljs-keyword">const</span> parser = <span class="hljs-keyword">new</span> DOMParser();

    mermaid.initialize({
      <span class="hljs-attr">maxTextSize</span>: <span class="hljs-number">100000</span>,
      <span class="hljs-attr">maxEdges</span>: <span class="hljs-number">100000</span>,
      <span class="hljs-attr">startOnLoad</span>: <span class="hljs-literal">false</span>,
      <span class="hljs-attr">fontFamily</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">window</span>
        .getComputedStyle(<span class="hljs-built_in">document</span>.body)
        .getPropertyValue(<span class="hljs-string">"--jp-ui-font-family"</span>),
      <span class="hljs-attr">theme</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">document</span>.querySelector(<span class="hljs-string">"body[data-jp-theme-light='true']"</span>)
        ? <span class="hljs-string">"default"</span>
        : <span class="hljs-string">"dark"</span>,
    });

    <span class="hljs-keyword">let</span> _nextMermaidId = <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;

    <span class="hljs-function"><span class="hljs-keyword">function</span> <span class="hljs-title">makeMermaidImage</span>(<span class="hljs-params">svg</span>) </span>{
      <span class="hljs-keyword">const</span> img = <span class="hljs-built_in">document</span>.createElement(<span class="hljs-string">"img"</span>);
      <span class="hljs-keyword">const</span> doc = parser.parseFromString(svg, <span class="hljs-string">"image/svg+xml"</span>);
      <span class="hljs-keyword">const</span> svgEl = doc.querySelector(<span class="hljs-string">"svg"</span>);
      <span class="hljs-keyword">const</span> { maxWidth } = svgEl?.style || {};
      <span class="hljs-keyword">const</span> firstTitle = doc.querySelector(<span class="hljs-string">"title"</span>);
      <span class="hljs-keyword">const</span> firstDesc = doc.querySelector(<span class="hljs-string">"desc"</span>);

      img.setAttribute(<span class="hljs-string">"src"</span>, <span class="hljs-string">`data:image/svg+xml,<span class="hljs-subst">${<span class="hljs-built_in">encodeURIComponent</span>(svg)}</span>`</span>);
      <span class="hljs-keyword">if</span> (maxWidth) {
        img.width = <span class="hljs-built_in">parseInt</span>(maxWidth);
      }
      <span class="hljs-keyword">if</span> (firstTitle) {
        img.setAttribute(<span class="hljs-string">"alt"</span>, firstTitle.textContent);
      }
      <span class="hljs-keyword">if</span> (firstDesc) {
        <span class="hljs-keyword">const</span> caption = <span class="hljs-built_in">document</span>.createElement(<span class="hljs-string">"figcaption"</span>);
        caption.className = <span class="hljs-string">"sr-only"</span>;
        caption.textContent = firstDesc.textContent;
        <span class="hljs-keyword">return</span> [img, caption];
      }
      <span class="hljs-keyword">return</span> [img];
    }

    <span class="hljs-keyword">async</span> <span class="hljs-function"><span class="hljs-keyword">function</span> <span class="hljs-title">makeMermaidError</span>(<span class="hljs-params">text</span>) </span>{
      <span class="hljs-keyword">let</span> errorMessage = <span class="hljs-string">""</span>;
      <span class="hljs-keyword">try</span> {
        <span class="hljs-keyword">await</span> mermaid.parse(text);
      } <span class="hljs-keyword">catch</span> (err) {
        errorMessage = <span class="hljs-string">`<span class="hljs-subst">${err}</span>`</span>;
      }

      <span class="hljs-keyword">const</span> result = <span class="hljs-built_in">document</span>.createElement(<span class="hljs-string">"details"</span>);
      result.className = <span class="hljs-string">'jp-RenderedMermaid-Details'</span>;
      <span class="hljs-keyword">const</span> summary = <span class="hljs-built_in">document</span>.createElement(<span class="hljs-string">"summary"</span>);
      summary.className = <span class="hljs-string">'jp-RenderedMermaid-Summary'</span>;
      <span class="hljs-keyword">const</span> pre = <span class="hljs-built_in">document</span>.createElement(<span class="hljs-string">"pre"</span>);
      <span class="hljs-keyword">const</span> code = <span class="hljs-built_in">document</span>.createElement(<span class="hljs-string">"code"</span>);
      code.innerText = text;
      pre.appendChild(code);
      summary.appendChild(pre);
      result.appendChild(summary);

      <span class="hljs-keyword">const</span> warning = <span class="hljs-built_in">document</span>.createElement(<span class="hljs-string">"pre"</span>);
      warning.innerText = errorMessage;
      result.appendChild(warning);
      <span class="hljs-keyword">return</span> [result];
    }

    <span class="hljs-keyword">async</span> <span class="hljs-function"><span class="hljs-keyword">function</span> <span class="hljs-title">renderOneMarmaid</span>(<span class="hljs-params">src</span>) </span>{
      <span class="hljs-keyword">const</span> id = <span class="hljs-string">`jp-mermaid-<span class="hljs-subst">${_nextMermaidId++}</span>`</span>;
      <span class="hljs-keyword">const</span> parent = src.parentNode;
      <span class="hljs-keyword">let</span> raw = src.textContent.trim();
      <span class="hljs-keyword">const</span> el = <span class="hljs-built_in">document</span>.createElement(<span class="hljs-string">"div"</span>);
      el.style.visibility = <span class="hljs-string">"hidden"</span>;
      <span class="hljs-built_in">document</span>.body.appendChild(el);
      <span class="hljs-keyword">let</span> results = <span class="hljs-literal">null</span>;
      <span class="hljs-keyword">let</span> output = <span class="hljs-literal">null</span>;
      <span class="hljs-keyword">try</span> {
        <span class="hljs-keyword">let</span> { svg } = <span class="hljs-keyword">await</span> mermaid.render(id, raw, el);
        svg = cleanMermaidSvg(svg);
        results = makeMermaidImage(svg);
        output = <span class="hljs-built_in">document</span>.createElement(<span class="hljs-string">"figure"</span>);
        results.map(output.appendChild, output);
      } <span class="hljs-keyword">catch</span> (err) {
        parent.classList.add(<span class="hljs-string">"jp-mod-warning"</span>);
        results = <span class="hljs-keyword">await</span> makeMermaidError(raw);
        output = results[<span class="hljs-number">0</span>];
      } <span class="hljs-keyword">finally</span> {
        el.remove();
      }
      parent.classList.add(<span class="hljs-string">"jp-RenderedMermaid"</span>);
      parent.appendChild(output);
    }


    <span class="hljs-comment">/**
     * Post-process to ensure mermaid diagrams contain only valid SVG and XHTML.
     */</span>
    <span class="hljs-function"><span class="hljs-keyword">function</span> <span class="hljs-title">cleanMermaidSvg</span>(<span class="hljs-params">svg</span>) </span>{
      <span class="hljs-keyword">return</span> svg.replace(RE_VOID_ELEMENT, replaceVoidElement);
    }


    <span class="hljs-comment">/**
     * A regular expression for all void elements, which may include attributes and
     * a slash.
     *
     * <span class="hljs-doctag">@see </span>https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/Void_element
     *
     * Of these, only `&lt;br&gt;` is generated by Mermaid in place of `\n`,
     * but _any_ "malformed" tag will break the SVG rendering entirely.
     */</span>
    <span class="hljs-keyword">const</span> RE_VOID_ELEMENT =
      <span class="hljs-regexp">/&lt;\s*(area|base|br|col|embed|hr|img|input|link|meta|param|source|track|wbr)\s*([^&gt;]*?)\s*&gt;/gi</span>;

    <span class="hljs-comment">/**
     * Ensure a void element is closed with a slash, preserving any attributes.
     */</span>
    <span class="hljs-function"><span class="hljs-keyword">function</span> <span class="hljs-title">replaceVoidElement</span>(<span class="hljs-params">match, tag, rest</span>) </span>{
      rest = rest.trim();
      <span class="hljs-keyword">if</span> (!rest.endsWith(<span class="hljs-string">'/'</span>)) {
        rest = <span class="hljs-string">`<span class="hljs-subst">${rest}</span> /`</span>;
      }
      <span class="hljs-keyword">return</span> <span class="hljs-string">`&lt;<span class="hljs-subst">${tag}</span> <span class="hljs-subst">${rest}</span>&gt;`</span>;
    }

    <span class="hljs-keyword">void</span> <span class="hljs-built_in">Promise</span>.all([...diagrams].map(renderOneMarmaid));
  });
</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">script</span>&gt;</span>
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">style</span>&gt;</span><span class="css">
  <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-Mermaid</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:not(.jp-RenderedMermaid)</span> {
    <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: none;
  }

  <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-RenderedMermaid</span> {
    <span class="hljs-attribute">overflow</span>: auto;
    <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: flex;
  }

  <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-RenderedMermaid</span><span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-mod-warning</span> {
    <span class="hljs-attribute">width</span>: auto;
    <span class="hljs-attribute">padding</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0.5em</span>;
    <span class="hljs-attribute">margin-top</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0.5em</span>;
    <span class="hljs-attribute">border</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-border-width) solid <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-warn-color2);
    <span class="hljs-attribute">border-radius</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-border-radius);
    <span class="hljs-attribute">color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-ui-font-color1);
    <span class="hljs-attribute">font-size</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-ui-font-size1);
    <span class="hljs-attribute">white-space</span>: pre-wrap;
    <span class="hljs-attribute">word-wrap</span>: break-word;
  }

  <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-RenderedMermaid</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">figure</span> {
    <span class="hljs-attribute">margin</span>: <span class="hljs-number">0</span>;
    <span class="hljs-attribute">overflow</span>: auto;
    <span class="hljs-attribute">max-width</span>: <span class="hljs-number">100%</span>;
  }

  <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-RenderedMermaid</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">img</span> {
    <span class="hljs-attribute">max-width</span>: <span class="hljs-number">100%</span>;
  }

  <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-RenderedMermaid-Details</span> &gt; <span class="hljs-selector-tag">pre</span> {
    <span class="hljs-attribute">margin-top</span>: <span class="hljs-number">1em</span>;
  }

  <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-RenderedMermaid-Summary</span> {
    <span class="hljs-attribute">color</span>: <span class="hljs-built_in">var</span>(--jp-warn-color2);
  }

  <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-RenderedMermaid</span><span class="hljs-selector-pseudo">:not(.jp-mod-warning)</span> <span class="hljs-selector-tag">pre</span> {
    <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: none;
  }

  <span class="hljs-selector-class">.jp-RenderedMermaid-Summary</span> &gt; <span class="hljs-selector-tag">pre</span> {
    <span class="hljs-attribute">display</span>: inline-block;
    <span class="hljs-attribute">white-space</span>: normal;
  }
</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">style</span>&gt;</span>
<span class="hljs-comment">&lt;!-- End of mermaid configuration --&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">head</span>&gt;</span>

<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">main</span>&gt;</span>

<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>

<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">h1</span> <span class="hljs-attr">id</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"Math-RL:-Arithmetic-Training"</span>&gt;</span>Math RL: Arithmetic Training<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">a</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"anchor-link"</span> <span class="hljs-attr">href</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"#Math-RL:-Arithmetic-Training"</span>&gt;</span>¶<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">a</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">h1</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">p</span>&gt;</span>This notebook demonstrates training an LLM to perform arithmetic using reinforcement learning with Tinker.<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">p</span>&gt;</span>
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">p</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">strong</span>&gt;</span>Goal<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">strong</span>&gt;</span>: Train the model to correctly add two-digit numbers.<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">p</span>&gt;</span>
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">p</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">strong</span>&gt;</span>Expected Results<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">strong</span>&gt;</span>: Reward increases from ~0.67 to 1.0 within the first 10-20 steps.<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">p</span>&gt;</span>

<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"n"</span>&gt;</span>config<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"o"</span>&gt;</span>=<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"p"</span>&gt;</span>{<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
